mapper.select: -- 배치기준일자 가져오기 SELECT BT_BAS_DT FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER( ) OVER ( ORDER BY RPT_GJDT DESC ) AS NUM , M.* FROM JRBA_RPT_BAS_M M WHERE M.BT_BAS_DT IS NOT NULL AND M.BT_JOB_ENDT IS NULL ) WHERE NUM = 1
mapper.delete: -- RBA보고항목데이터 테이블에서 데이터 삭제 DELETE FROM JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I A WHERE BAS_YYMM = SUBSTR(#{btBasDt},0,6) AND REPLACE(A.JIPYO_IDX,'.','') = #{hmCd}
mapper.select:
-- 자동화 대상 보고항목 리스트 추출 WITH BASE_DT AS ( SELECT SUBSTR(#{btBasDt},1,6) AS YYYYMM -- 해당분기 YYYYMM , TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{btBasDt},'YYYYMMDD') +1,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYYMMDD'),-6),'YYYYMMDD') AS J1_S_DT -- 해당분기 시작일 ( YYYYMMDD_6M_BF ) , #{btBasDt} AS J1_E_DT -- 해당분기 YYYYMMDD FROM DUAL ) SELECT REPLACE(JIPYO_IDX,'.','') AS JIPYO_IDX , B.YYYYMM , B.J1_S_DT , B.J1_E_DT FROM JRBA_JIPYO_M A , BASE_DT B WHERE IN_METH_C = '1' -- 입력방식구분 (0: 수기, 1: 자동) AND RPT_GJDT = #{rptGjdt} AND JIPYO_IDX NOT IN ('I.1.07.04' , 'I.1.04.02', 'I.4.01.03', 'I.4.01.04') -- 속도개선 XXX 20251014
ORDER BY JIPYO_IDX
mapper.insert:
-- I.1.01.01 고객특성_거래자 유형별 현황 INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I (BAS_YYMM,JIPYO_IDX,IN_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME,SMMT_STRT_DT,SMMT_END_DT)
SELECT SUBSTR(#{J1_E_DT},1,6) AS BAS_YYMM -- 기준년월 ,'I.1.01.01' AS JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,( SELECT SUM(RSLT_VALU) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID) AS RSLT_VALU
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D , SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY E WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = E.ENTY_ID
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{btBasDt})) AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') -- 리테일계좌만 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID ) AND D.PRCE_DATE <= #{btBasDt} -- 고객등록일자 AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') -- 등급 존재
AND (A.NTNY_ID IN ( -- 사업장국가ID : CDD정보 SELECT CNTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY C1 , ( SELECT DISTINCT NTN_CD FROM SRBA_NAT_I A, RA_ITEM_NTN B, SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY C WHERE 1=1 AND A.NTN_CD = C.CNTY_CODE AND B.RA_ITEM_CODE = C.CNTY_NO_CODE AND B.ABS_HRSK_YN IN ('Y','H') AND A.BAS_YYMM IN ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_NAT_I ) ) C2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND TRIM(C1.CNTY_CODE) = TRIM(C2.NTN_CD) )
OR A.BSPL_CNTY_ID IN ( -- 사업장국가ID : CDD정보 SELECT CNTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY C1 , ( SELECT DISTINCT NTN_CD FROM SRBA_NAT_I A, RA_ITEM_NTN B, SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY C WHERE 1=1 AND A.NTN_CD = C.CNTY_CODE AND B.RA_ITEM_CODE = C.CNTY_NO_CODE AND B.ABS_HRSK_YN IN ('Y','H') AND A.BAS_YYMM IN ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_NAT_I ) ) C2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND TRIM(C1.CNTY_CODE) = TRIM(C2.NTN_CD) )
OR A.MNBR_CNTY_ID IN ( -- 본점국가ID : CDD정보 SELECT CNTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY C1 , ( SELECT DISTINCT NTN_CD FROM SRBA_NAT_I A, RA_ITEM_NTN B, SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY C WHERE 1=1 AND A.NTN_CD = C.CNTY_CODE AND B.RA_ITEM_CODE = C.CNTY_NO_CODE AND B.ABS_HRSK_YN IN ('Y','H') AND A.BAS_YYMM IN ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_NAT_I ) ) C2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND TRIM(C1.CNTY_CODE) = TRIM(C2.NTN_CD) ) )
) WHERE 1 = 1 ) AS IN_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,#{J1_S_DT} AS SMMT_STRT_DT -- 집계기준시작일 ,#{J1_E_DT} AS SMMT_END_DT -- 집계기준종료일 FROM DUAL

-- I.1.01.02 고위험국가 고객 거래금액 규모 INSERT INTO /*+ APPEND PARALLEL(4) */ JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I (BAS_YYMM,JIPYO_IDX,IN_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME,SMMT_STRT_DT,SMMT_END_DT) SELECT SUBSTR(#{J1_E_DT},1,6) AS BAS_YYMM -- 기준년월 ,'I.1.01.02' AS JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,( SELECT ROUND(SUM(Z.AMT_TOTAL) / 1000000, 2) AS RSLT_VALU FROM ( SELECT SUM(ZZ.TRDG_AMNT) AS AMT_TOTAL FROM ( SELECT T.ACNT_ID , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('3', '4') THEN T.BFTX_KRW_TRDG_AMNT -- 입출금 ELSE T.TRDG_DNOM_AMNT END AS TRDG_AMNT -- 입출고 , TC.TRDG_CODE , TC.DTLS_TRDG_NAME , T.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE , T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG T INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD TC ON TC.TRDG_CODE = T.TRDG_CODE AND TC.DTLS_TRDG_NAME NOT LIKE '%대차%' WHERE T.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND T.TRDG_CODE >= '300000' AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT LIKE '%9' AND T.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND T.CRNY_CODE IN ('KRW', ' ', '') AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT IN('301180' ,'301189' ,'301420' ,'301430' ,'301439' ,'301440' ,'301449' ,'301450' ,'301459' ,'301460','301469' ,'301890' ,'301899' ,'301900' ,'301909' ,'301910' ,'301919' ,'301920' ,'301929' ,'302230' ,'302239','302240' ,'302249' ,'303910' ,'303919' ,'A99010' ,'Q00400' ,'Q00800' ,'T00030' ,'U00080' ,'U00200' ,'U00500') AND T.ACNT_TRDG_KIND_CODE <> '14' -- 주석거래(관리점변경, 통장기장 등) AND T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE NOT LIKE 'B%' -- 배치거래 제외
UNION ALL
SELECT T.ACNT_ID , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('3', '4') THEN T.BFTX_FRGN_CRNY_TRDG_AMNT * (A.DATA_VALU / B.BAS_SCLG_FCTR) -- 입출금 ELSE T.TRDG_DLNG_UNIT_PRIC * T.TRDG_PRCE_QNTY * (A.DATA_VALU / B.BAS_SCLG_FCTR) END AS TRDG_AMNT -- 입출고 , TC.TRDG_CODE , TC.DTLS_TRDG_NAME , T.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE , T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG T INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD TC ON TC.TRDG_CODE = T.TRDG_CODE AND TC.DTLS_TRDG_NAME NOT LIKE '%대차%' INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUM_MARKET_DATA A ON A.BSNS_DATE = T.TRDG_DATE AND A.PRIC_TYPE_CODE = 'BKR' -- 가격유형코드(BKR.한국은행고시환율) AND A.DATA_VALU_TYPE_CODE = 'XCR' -- 데이터값유형코드(XCR.환율) AND A.DATA_SORC_ENTY_ID = 102001 -- 블룸버그 AND A.EOD_TYPE_CODE = 'SNP' -- EOD유형코드(EOD.EOD, SNP.스냅샷) INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUP_CURRENCY_PAIR B ON A.PRDT_ID = B.PRDT_ID AND B.BAS_CRNY_CODE = 'KRW' AND B.TAGT_CRNY_CODE = T.CRNY_CODE WHERE T.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND T.TRDG_CODE >= '300000' AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT LIKE '%9' AND T.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND (T.CRNY_CODE <> 'KRW' AND T.CRNY_CODE <> ' ' AND T.CRNY_CODE IS NOT NULL) AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT IN('301180' ,'301189' ,'301420' ,'301430' ,'301439' ,'301440' ,'301449' ,'301450' ,'301459' ,'301460','301469' ,'301890' ,'301899' ,'301900' ,'301909' ,'301910' ,'301919' ,'301920' ,'301929' ,'302230' ,'302239','302240' ,'302249' ,'303910' ,'303919' ,'A99010' ,'Q00400' ,'Q00800' ,'T00030' ,'U00080' ,'U00200' ,'U00500') AND T.ACNT_TRDG_KIND_CODE <> '14' -- 주석거래(관리점변경, 통장기장 등) AND T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE NOT LIKE 'B%' -- 배치거래 제외
) ZZ , SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT AC
WHERE 1 = 1 AND AC.ACNT_OWNR_ID IN (
SELECT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AS ENTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D , SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY E WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = E.ENTY_ID
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{btBasDt})) AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') -- 리테일계좌만 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID ) AND D.PRCE_DATE <= #{btBasDt} -- 고객등록일자 AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') -- 등급 존재
AND (A.NTNY_ID IN ( -- 사업장국가ID : CDD정보 SELECT CNTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY C1 , ( SELECT DISTINCT NTN_CD FROM SRBA_NAT_I A, RA_ITEM_NTN B, SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY C WHERE 1=1 AND A.NTN_CD = C.CNTY_CODE AND B.RA_ITEM_CODE = C.CNTY_NO_CODE AND B.ABS_HRSK_YN IN ('Y','H') AND A.BAS_YYMM IN ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_NAT_I ) ) C2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND TRIM(C1.CNTY_CODE) = TRIM(C2.NTN_CD) )
OR A.BSPL_CNTY_ID IN ( -- 사업장국가ID : CDD정보 SELECT CNTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY C1 , ( SELECT DISTINCT NTN_CD FROM SRBA_NAT_I A, RA_ITEM_NTN B, SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY C WHERE 1=1 AND A.NTN_CD = C.CNTY_CODE AND B.RA_ITEM_CODE = C.CNTY_NO_CODE AND B.ABS_HRSK_YN IN ('Y','H') AND A.BAS_YYMM IN ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_NAT_I ) ) C2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND TRIM(C1.CNTY_CODE) = TRIM(C2.NTN_CD) )
OR A.MNBR_CNTY_ID IN ( -- 본점국가ID : CDD정보 SELECT CNTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY C1 , ( SELECT DISTINCT NTN_CD FROM SRBA_NAT_I A, RA_ITEM_NTN B, SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY C WHERE 1=1 AND A.NTN_CD = C.CNTY_CODE AND B.RA_ITEM_CODE = C.CNTY_NO_CODE AND B.ABS_HRSK_YN IN ('Y','H') AND A.BAS_YYMM IN ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_NAT_I ) ) C2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND TRIM(C1.CNTY_CODE) = TRIM(C2.NTN_CD) ) )
) AND AC.ACNT_ID = ZZ.ACNT_ID GROUP BY AC.ACNT_OWNR_ID )Z WHERE 1 = 1 ) AS IN_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,#{J1_S_DT} AS SMMT_STRT_DT -- 집계기준시작일 ,#{J1_E_DT} AS SMMT_END_DT -- 집계기준종료일 FROM DUAL

-- I.1.03.02 개인사업자 고객 규모 INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I (BAS_YYMM,JIPYO_IDX,IN_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME,SMMT_STRT_DT,SMMT_END_DT) SELECT SUBSTR(#{J1_E_DT},1,6) AS BAS_YYMM -- 기준년월 ,'I.1.03.02' AS JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,( SELECT SUM(RSLT_VALU) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID) AS RSLT_VALU FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{btBasDt})) AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') -- 리테일계좌만 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B WHERE B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND B.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ )
AND D.PRCE_DATE <= #{btBasDt} -- 고객등록일자 AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') -- 등급 존재 AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- CDD고객구분코드(1.개인, 2.영리법인, 3.비영리법인) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT AA INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT_FUNCTION AF ON AA.ACNT_ID = AF.ACNT_ID AND AF.ACNT_FNCN_TYPE_CODE = 'PRBS' -- 개인사업용계좌 AND AF.ALWD_YN = 'Y' WHERE AA.ACNT_OWNR_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND AA.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 ) ) WHERE 1 = 1 ) AS IN_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,#{J1_S_DT} AS SMMT_STRT_DT -- 집계기준시작일 ,#{J1_E_DT} AS SMMT_END_DT -- 집계기준종료일 FROM DUAL

-- I.1.03.03 법인 고객 규모 INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I (BAS_YYMM,JIPYO_IDX,IN_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME,SMMT_STRT_DT,SMMT_END_DT) SELECT SUBSTR(#{J1_E_DT},1,6) AS BAS_YYMM -- 기준년월 ,'I.1.03.03' AS JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,( SELECT SUM(RSLT_VALU) FROM (
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID) AS RSLT_VALU FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{btBasDt})) AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') -- 리테일계좌만 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B WHERE B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND B.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ )
AND D.PRCE_DATE <= #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 고객등록일자 AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') -- 등급 존재 AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') -- CDD고객구분코드(1.개인, 2.영리법인, 3.비영리법인)
) WHERE 1 = 1 ) AS IN_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,#{J1_S_DT} AS SMMT_STRT_DT -- 집계기준시작일 ,#{J1_E_DT} AS SMMT_END_DT -- 집계기준종료일 FROM DUAL

-- I.1.03.04 외국인 규모 INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I (BAS_YYMM,JIPYO_IDX,IN_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME,SMMT_STRT_DT,SMMT_END_DT) SELECT SUBSTR(#{J1_E_DT},1,6) AS BAS_YYMM -- 기준년월 ,'I.1.03.04' AS JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,( SELECT SUM(RSLT_VALU) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID) AS RSLT_VALU FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') -- 리테일계좌만
AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B WHERE B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND B.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ ) AND D.PRCE_DATE <= #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 고객등록일자 AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L')
AND A.NTNY_ID <> 1000000001 -- 소속국가ID : 대한민국이 아니고 AND A.NTNY_ID > 0 ) WHERE 1 = 1 ) AS IN_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,#{J1_S_DT} AS SMMT_STRT_DT -- 집계기준시작일 ,#{J1_E_DT} AS SMMT_END_DT -- 집계기준종료일 FROM DUAL

-- I.1.03.05 비거주자 규모 INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I (BAS_YYMM,JIPYO_IDX,IN_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME,SMMT_STRT_DT,SMMT_END_DT) SELECT SUBSTR(#{J1_E_DT},1,6) AS BAS_YYMM -- 기준년월 ,'I.1.03.05' AS JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,( SELECT SUM(RSLT_VALU) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID) AS RSLT_VALU FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') -- 리테일계좌만
AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B WHERE B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND B.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ ) AND D.PRCE_DATE <= #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 고객등록일자 AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L')
AND A.RSDT_CNTY_ID <> 1000000001 -- 거주국가ID : 대한민국이 아니고 AND A.RSDT_CNTY_ID > 0 AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- CDD고객구분코드(1.개인, 2.영리법인, 3.비영리법인) ) WHERE 1 = 1 ) AS IN_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,#{J1_S_DT} AS SMMT_STRT_DT -- 집계기준시작일 ,#{J1_E_DT} AS SMMT_END_DT -- 집계기준종료일 FROM DUAL

-- I.1.04.01 고액자산가 규모 INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I (BAS_YYMM,JIPYO_IDX,IN_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME,SMMT_STRT_DT,SMMT_END_DT) SELECT SUBSTR(#{J1_E_DT},1,6) AS BAS_YYMM -- 기준년월 ,'I.1.04.01' AS JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,( SELECT CNT FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID) AS CNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D , ( SELECT CLNT_ENTY_ID, SUM(ASST_VLTN_ACML_AMNT)/(SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(#{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD')), 'DD')) FROM DUAL) AS ASST_VLTN_ACML_AMNT FROM SID.IDA_SETL_STD_BAL_M WHERE STNR_YYMM = #{YYYYMM} GROUP BY CLNT_ENTY_ID ) E WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') -- 리테일계좌만
AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID )
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B WHERE B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND B.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ )
AND D.PRCE_DATE <= #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 고객등록일자 AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L')
AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- CDD고객구분코드(1.개인, 2.영리법인, 3.비영리법인)
AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = E.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND E.ASST_VLTN_ACML_AMNT >= 1000000000 -- 10억 ) WHERE 1 = 1 ) AS IN_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,#{J1_S_DT} AS SMMT_STRT_DT -- 집계기준시작일 ,#{J1_E_DT} AS SMMT_END_DT -- 집계기준종료일 FROM DUAL

-- I.1.05.01 비영리단체 규모 INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I (BAS_YYMM,JIPYO_IDX,IN_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME,SMMT_STRT_DT,SMMT_END_DT) SELECT SUBSTR(#{J1_E_DT},1,6) AS BAS_YYMM -- 기준년월 ,'I.1.05.01' AS JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,( SELECT CNT FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID) AS CNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') -- 리테일계좌만 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B WHERE B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND B.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ ) AND D.PRCE_DATE <= #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 고객등록일자 AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') -- 등급 존재 AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '3' -- CDD고객구분코드(1.개인, 2.영리법인, 3.비영리법인) ) WHERE 1 = 1 ) AS IN_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,#{J1_S_DT} AS SMMT_STRT_DT -- 집계기준시작일 ,#{J1_E_DT} AS SMMT_END_DT -- 집계기준종료일 FROM DUAL

-- I.1.05.02 : 비영리단체 거래금액 규모 INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I (BAS_YYMM,JIPYO_IDX,IN_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME,SMMT_STRT_DT,SMMT_END_DT) SELECT SUBSTR(#{J1_E_DT},1,6) AS BAS_YYMM -- 기준년월 ,'I.1.05.02' AS JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,(SELECT ROUND(SUM(ZZ.TRDG_AMNT) / 1000000,2) -- 1293874.039721 FROM ( SELECT /*+ FULL(T) PARALLEL(T 8) */ SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('3', '4') THEN T.BFTX_KRW_TRDG_AMNT ELSE T.TRDG_DNOM_AMNT END) AS TRDG_AMNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG T INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD TC ON TC.TRDG_CODE = T.TRDG_CODE AND TC.DTLS_TRDG_NAME NOT LIKE '%대차%' WHERE T.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND T.TRDG_CODE >= '300000' AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT LIKE '%9' AND T.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND T.CRNY_CODE IN ('KRW', ' ', '') AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT IN('301180' ,'301189' ,'301420' ,'301430' ,'301439' ,'301440' ,'301449' ,'301450' ,'301459' ,'301460','301469' ,'301890' ,'301899' ,'301900' ,'301909' ,'301910' ,'301919' ,'301920' ,'301929' ,'302230' ,'302239','302240' ,'302249' ,'303910' ,'303919' ,'A99010' ,'Q00400' ,'Q00800' ,'T00030' ,'U00080' ,'U00200' ,'U00500') AND T.ACNT_TRDG_KIND_CODE <> '14' -- 주석거래(관리점변경, 통장기장 등) AND T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE NOT LIKE 'B%' -- 배치거래 제외 AND T.ACNT_ID IN ( SELECT /*+ FULL(B) PARALLEL(B 8) */ B.ACNT_ID AS ACNT_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D , SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') -- 리테일계좌만 AND ((A.RGBR_CODE <> '21220' OR A.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE IN ('1','2','3')) OR (A.RGBR_CODE <> '21220' AND A.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE IN ('1','2','3')) ) AND D.PRCE_DATE <= #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 고객등록일자 AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '3' -- CDD고객구분코드(1.개인, 2.영리법인, 3.비영리법인) )
UNION ALL
SELECT /*+ FULL(B) PARALLEL(B 8) */ SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('3', '4') THEN T.BFTX_FRGN_CRNY_TRDG_AMNT * (A.DATA_VALU / B.BAS_SCLG_FCTR) ELSE T.TRDG_DLNG_UNIT_PRIC * T.TRDG_PRCE_QNTY * (A.DATA_VALU / B.BAS_SCLG_FCTR) END) AS TRDG_AMNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG T INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD TC ON TC.TRDG_CODE = T.TRDG_CODE AND TC.DTLS_TRDG_NAME NOT LIKE '%대차%' INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUM_MARKET_DATA A ON A.BSNS_DATE = T.TRDG_DATE AND A.PRIC_TYPE_CODE = 'BKR' -- 가격유형코드(BKR.한국은행고시환율) AND A.DATA_VALU_TYPE_CODE = 'XCR' -- 데이터값유형코드(XCR.환율) AND A.DATA_SORC_ENTY_ID = 102001 -- 블룸버그 AND A.EOD_TYPE_CODE = 'SNP' -- EOD유형코드(EOD.EOD, SNP.스냅샷) INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUP_CURRENCY_PAIR B ON A.PRDT_ID = B.PRDT_ID AND B.BAS_CRNY_CODE = 'KRW' AND B.TAGT_CRNY_CODE = T.CRNY_CODE WHERE T.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND T.TRDG_CODE >= '300000' AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT LIKE '%9' AND T.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND (T.CRNY_CODE <> 'KRW' AND T.CRNY_CODE <> ' ' AND T.CRNY_CODE IS NOT NULL) AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT IN('301180' ,'301189' ,'301420' ,'301430' ,'301439' ,'301440' ,'301449' ,'301450' ,'301459' ,'301460','301469' ,'301890' ,'301899' ,'301900' ,'301909' ,'301910' ,'301919' ,'301920' ,'301929' ,'302230' ,'302239','302240' ,'302249' ,'303910' ,'303919' ,'A99010' ,'Q00400' ,'Q00800' ,'T00030' ,'U00080' ,'U00200' ,'U00500') AND T.ACNT_TRDG_KIND_CODE <> '14' -- 주석거래(관리점변경, 통장기장 등) AND T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE NOT LIKE 'B%' -- 배치거래 제외 AND T.ACNT_ID IN ( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(A 8) */ B.ACNT_ID AS ACNT_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D , SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') -- 리테일계좌만 AND ((A.RGBR_CODE <> '21220' OR A.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE IN ('1','2','3')) OR (A.RGBR_CODE <> '21220' AND A.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE IN ('1','2','3')) ) AND D.PRCE_DATE <= #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 고객등록일자 AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '3' -- CDD고객구분코드(1.개인, 2.영리법인, 3.비영리법인) ) ) ZZ
WHERE 1 = 1
) AS IN_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,#{J1_S_DT} AS SMMT_STRT_DT -- 집계기준시작일 ,#{J1_E_DT} AS SMMT_END_DT -- 집계기준종료일 FROM DUAL

-- I.1.06.02 : CTR 고객 비율 INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I (BAS_YYMM,JIPYO_IDX,IN_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME,SMMT_STRT_DT,SMMT_END_DT) SELECT SUBSTR(#{J1_E_DT},1,6) AS BAS_YYMM -- 기준년월 ,'I.1.06.02' AS JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,(SELECT ROUND(NULLIF(X.CNT_CTR,0) / NULLIF(Y.CNT_CASH, 0) * 100, 2) AS RSLT_VALU FROM ( -- RBA시스템 구축 후 CTR보고 건수 SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.DL_P_RNMCNO) AS CNT_CTR FROM SSQ.NIC66B A , SSQ.NIC71B B , SSQ.NIC75B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR','CAC') AND DECODE(A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD,'99',1,0) = 1 -- 1:보고완료 AND C.DL_DT BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} -- 거래일자 ) X , (
-- 12개월 현금거래 고객수 : 115446명
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN ZZ.ACNT_OWNR_ID = 0 THEN ZZ.ENTY_ID ELSE ZZ.ACNT_OWNR_ID END)) AS CNT_CASH -- 현금거래 고객수 -- , ZZ.ENTY_ID -- , ZZ.ACNT_OWNR_ID -- , ZZ.CASH_RCPS_AMNT FROM (
SELECT CASE WHEN A.ASPR_CLNT_RNNO_CRYP > ' ' THEN A.ASPR_CLNT_RNNO_CRYP ELSE NVL(E.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, ' ') END /* E1 2017-05-18 추가 */ , NVL(E1.ENTY_ID,0) AS ENTY_ID /* 의뢰인고객번호고객번호*/ , B.ACNT_OWNR_ID /* 고객ID */ , B.ACNT_NO_CRYP /* 계좌번호 */ , A.ACNT_ID /* 계좌ID */ , A.RAPA_SECT_CODE /* 입출금구분코드 */ , A.TRDG_CODE /* 거래코드 */ , '01' /* 거래채널 */ , '01' /* 현금 */ , '12' /* 비우면 에러남.. 매체필수 아니므로 22로 채움 */ , NVL(A.CASH_RCPS_AMNT , 0 ) AS CASH_RCPS_AMNT /* 현금출납금액 */ , NVL(A1.DTBR_CODE , '') /* 처리점코드 */ , A.PRBN_ENTY_ID /* 처리점엔티티ID */ , CASE WHEN NVL(RTRIM(A.MEDI_ACKN_YN), 'Y') != 'Y' THEN B.ACNT_NO_CRYP ELSE ' ' END/* 수취인계좌번호 */ , CASE WHEN NVL(RTRIM(A.MEDI_ACKN_YN), 'Y') != 'Y' THEN '삼성증권' ELSE ' ' END /* 수취인금융기관명 */ , CASE WHEN NVL(RTRIM(A.MEDI_ACKN_YN), 'Y') != 'Y' THEN '240' ELSE ' ' END /* 비계좌(기타) + 영수*/ , A.TRDG_DATE
FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG_RAPA A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT A1 ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = A1.ENTY_ID /* E1 2017-05-18 추가 */ LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS E1 ON RTRIM(A.ASPR_CLNT_RNNO_CRYP) = RTRIM(E1.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP) /* 물리적 Key는 아니나 UK 보장 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_ENTY_NAME C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN D LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS E ON D.CLNT_ENTY_ID = E.ENTY_ID AND D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = E.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE WHERE A.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID AND B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = C.ENTY_ID AND B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND A.RAPA_SECT_CODE = '1' /* 입출금구분코드 */ AND A.TRDG_CODE IN ('300060', '300050', '300020') /* 비저축현금입금, 입금, 현금입금(신탁)*/ AND A.RAPA_NO > 0 /* 입출금번호 */ AND NVL(A.CASH_RCPS_AMNT, 0) > 0 /* 현금출납금액 */ -- AND (A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE IN ('A02', 'A03') /* 처리채널구분코드 */ -- OR (A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE NOT IN ('A02', 'A03') /* 처리채널구분코드 */ -- AND A.CASH_RCPS_AMNT > 1000000 ) ) /* 현금출납금액 */
AND C.ENTY_NAME_TYPE_CODE = 'NM' AND C.LANG_CODE = 'KO'
UNION ALL
SELECT CASE WHEN RTRIM(A.ASPR_CLNT_RNNO_CRYP) > ' ' THEN RTRIM(A.ASPR_CLNT_RNNO_CRYP) ELSE NVL(E.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, ' ') END /* E1 2017-05-18 추가 */ , NVL(E1.ENTY_ID,0) AS ENTY_ID /* 의뢰인고객번호고객번호*/ , B.ACNT_OWNR_ID /* 고객ID */ , B.ACNT_NO_CRYP /* 계좌번호 */ , A.ACNT_ID /* 계좌ID */ , A.RAPA_SECT_CODE /* 입출금구분코드 */ , A.TRDG_CODE , '01' /* 거래채널 */ , '01' /* 현금 */ , '11' , NVL(A.CASH_RCPS_AMNT , 0 ) AS CASH_RCPS_AMNT /* 현금출납금액 */ , NVL(A1.DTBR_CODE , '') /* 처리점코드 */ , A.PRBN_ENTY_ID /* 처리점엔티티ID */ , '' , '' , '' , A.TRDG_DATE
FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG_RAPA A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT A1 ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = A1.ENTY_ID /* E1 2017-05-18 추가 */ LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS E1 ON RTRIM(A.ASPR_CLNT_RNNO_CRYP) = RTRIM(E1.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP) /* 물리적 Key는 아니나 UK 보장 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN D LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS E ON D.CLNT_ENTY_ID = E.ENTY_ID AND D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = E.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE
WHERE A.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID AND B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND A.RAPA_SECT_CODE = '2' /* 입출금구분코드 */ AND A.TRDG_CODE IN ('400210','400120','400070','400020','400280','400260','400240','400220', '400060','400050','400040','400030','400020') /* 출금, 폐쇄출금,출금(신탁),폐쇄출금(신탁),책임자출금(기타),책임자출금(압류),책임자출금(카드발급전) */ /* 책임자출금(폐쇄계좌),책임자출금(기타-신탁),책임자출금(압류-신탁),책임자출금(카드발급전-신탁) */ /* 책임자출금(폐쇄계좌-신탁),폐쇄출금(신탁) */ AND A.RAPA_NO > 0 AND NVL(A.CASH_RCPS_AMNT, 0) > 0 /* 현금출납금액 */
UNION ALL
/* CD기 출금 * 2014-06-12 * 거래코드 추가 * 401000(은행CD기매도출금) -> 거래발생x ( 2013년기준 ) 402700(VAN-CD기출금) -> 거래발생됨( 2013년기준 - 점외 CD기) : 이체거래코드 : 214000 402710(시간외VAN-CD기출금) -> 거래발생됨( 2013년기준 - 점외 CD기) : 이체거래코드 : 214000 402720(365VAN-CD기출금) -> 거래발생됨( 2013년기준 - 점외 CD기) : 이체거래코드 : 214000 402910(시간외증권CD기출금) -> 거래발생됨( 2013년기준 - 객장 CD기) : 이체거래코드 : 214000 403090(365증권CD기출금) -> 거래발생됨( 2013년기준 - 객장 CD기) : 이체거래코드 : 214000 403380(증권CD기현금출금(당사)(취급)) -> 거래발생x ( 2013년기준 ) 902580(증권CD기현금출금(타사)(취급)) -> 거래발생x ( 2013년기준 ) 403220(은행CD기현금출금(개설)) -> 거래발생됨( 2013년기준 - CD공동망 ) : 이체거래코드 : 201000 * 2017-05-18 * CD기 출금거래 : 당사ATM/VAN 출금, 삼성가상계좌ATM/VAN출금, 삼성페이ATM출금, 삼성페이은행CD기 출금 404640(CD기(삼성페이)출금) 404690(은행CD기(삼성페이)출금) * * CTR_CASH_AMNT -> CASH_TRDG_AMNT 수정 * */ SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(RTRIM(A.ASPR_RNNO_CRYP), '') = '' THEN (NVL(E.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, '')) ELSE NVL(RTRIM(A.ASPR_RNNO_CRYP), '') END , /* 고객번호 */ 0 AS ENTY_ID, B.ACNT_OWNR_ID , /* 고객ID */ B.ACNT_NO_CRYP , /* 계좌번호 */ A.ACNT_ID , /* 증권사계좌번호 */ '2' , A.TRDG_CODE , '02' , /* 창구거래 */ '01' , /* 현금 */ '11' , NVL(A.CASH_TRDG_AMNT , 0) AS CASH_RCPS_AMNT , /* CTR현금금액 */ NVL(F.DTBR_CODE , ' ') , /* 처리점코드 */ A.PRBN_ENTY_ID , /* 처리점ID */ NVL(A.RLTV_FNC_ACNT_NO_CRYP , ''), /* 은행계좌번호 */ NVL(C.BANK_NAME , ''), /* 은행코드명 */ NVL(C.BANK_CODE , '') /* 은행코드 */ , A.TRDG_DATE
FROM SID.IDO_A_MBP_BNKN_TRDG_DTLD A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B ON A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUS_BANK C ON A.RLTV_BANK_BNCD = C.BANK_CODE , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN D LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS E ON D.CLNT_ENTY_ID = E.ENTY_ID AND D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = E.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE
WHERE A.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND A.TRDG_CODE IN ('401010', '400950', '400930', '400850', '402550', '401000', '402700', '402710', '402720', '402910', '403090', '403380', '902580', '403220', /*은행CD기출금, CD기출금, 마감후은행CD기출금, 365은행CD기출금, VAN-CD기출금 추가 */ '404640', '404690') /*삼성페이 ATM-은행CD출금 */ AND NVL(A.CASH_TRDG_AMNT, 0) > 0 /* CTR현금금액 */ AND A.TRRC_SECT_CODE = '2' /* 송수신구분코드 */ /*AND A.TNFR_TRDG_CODE IN ('204000','205000') 이체업무구분코드(2014-06-12 의미없어 삭제함) */ AND A.CANC_YN = 'N' AND A.BANK_PRCE_STAS_CODE = '1' /* 은행처리결과구분코드 */ AND B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
UNION ALL
/* CD기 입금 * 2014-06-12 * 302570(VAN-CD기입금) -> 거래발생X ( 2013년기준 ) 302580(시간외VAN-CD기입금) -> 거래발생X ( 2013년기준 ) 302850(증권CD기입금) -> 거래발생됨 ( 2013년기준 - 롯데ATM ) : 이체거래코드 : 111000 302860(시간외증권CD기입금) -> 거래발생됨 ( 2013년기준 - 롯데ATM ) : 이체거래코드 : 111000 302960(365증권CD기입금) -> 거래발생됨 ( 2013년기준 - 롯데ATM ) : 이체거래코드 : 111000 303100(증권CD기현금입금(취급)) -> 거래발생X ( 2013년기준 ) 303000(은행CD기현금입금) -> 거래발생됨 ( 2013년기준 - CD공동망) : 이체거래코드 : 103000 * 2017-05-18 * CD기 입금거래 : 당사ATM/VAN 입금, 삼성가상계좌ATM/VAN입금, 삼성페이ATM입금, 삼성페이은행CD기 입금 304250(CD기(삼성페이)입금) 304290(은행CD기(삼성페이)입금) * CTR_CASH_AMNT -> CASH_TRDG_AMNT 수정 * */ SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(RTRIM(A.ASPR_RNNO_CRYP), '') = '' THEN (NVL(E.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, '')) ELSE NVL(RTRIM(A.ASPR_RNNO_CRYP), '') END , /* 고객번호 */ 0 AS ENTY_ID, B.ACNT_OWNR_ID , /* 고객ID */ B.ACNT_NO_CRYP , /* 계좌번호 */ A.ACNT_ID , /* 계좌ID */ '1' , A.TRDG_CODE , '02' , /* 창구거래 */ '01' , /* 현금 */ '12' , NVL(A.CASH_TRDG_AMNT, 0) AS CASH_RCPS_AMNT , /* CTR현금금액 */ NVL(F.DTBR_CODE, ' ') , /* 처리점코드 */ A.PRBN_ENTY_ID , /* 처리점ID */ NVL(A.RLTV_FNC_ACNT_NO_CRYP , '') , /* 은행계좌번호 */ NVL(C.BANK_NAME , '') , /* 은행코드명 */ NVL(C.BANK_CODE , '') /* 은행코드 */ , A.TRDG_DATE
FROM SID.IDO_A_MBP_BNKN_TRDG_DTLD A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B ON A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUS_BANK C ON A.RLTV_BANK_BNCD = C.BANK_CODE , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN D LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS E ON D.CLNT_ENTY_ID = E.ENTY_ID AND D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = E.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE
WHERE A.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND A.TRDG_CODE IN ('300440', '302570', '302580', '302850', '302860', '302960', '303100', '303000',/* 은행 CD기 입금 */ '304250', '304290')/* 삼성페이 CD기 입금 */ /****************** 2008.06.13 이체입금 빼달라고 해서 변경 AND A.TRDG_CODE IN ('300440', '300500', '300380', '300320', '300310', '300280') 은행CD기입금, 은행이체입금, 마감후은행이체입금, 365은행이체입금, 은행이체입금(신탁), 마감후은행이체입금(신탁) ********************/ AND NVL(A.CASH_TRDG_AMNT, 0) > 0 AND A.TRRC_SECT_CODE ='2' /* 송수신구분코드 */ /*AND A.TNFR_TRDG_CODE IN ('101000','102000') 이체업무구분코드 2014-06-12 불필요하여 삭제 */ AND A.CANC_YN = 'N' AND A.BANK_PRCE_STAS_CODE = '1' /* 은행처리결과구분코드 */ AND B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
UNION ALL
/* 송금 * 2014-06-12 송금정보에는 계좌id가 없어서 uua_acnt 조인조건 없앰 * ASPR_RNNO_CRYP -> RMPR_RNNO_CRYP 로 수정 * 2014-06-12 가상계좌창구입금 추가. * 2017-05-18 계좌주id 쿼리 수정 * 2017-06-01 의뢰인실명번호 가져오도록 수정.(안세혁) * 2018-02-08 송금내역 조회 시 SELECT 컬럼 변경. 의뢰인명 -> 수취인명.(안세혁) * */
/* SELECT A.RMPR_RNNO_CRYP , 고객번호*/ /* SELECT CASE WHEN A.RMPR_RNNO_CRYP <> ' ' THEN A.RMPR_RNNO_CRYP ELSE A.ASPR_RNNO_CRYP END * , E1.ENTY_ID */ SELECT A.ASPR_RNNO_CRYP , E1.ENTY_ID AS ENTY_ID , 0 , ' ' /* 계좌번호 */ , A.ACNT_ID /* 계좌ID */ , '1' , A.TRDG_CODE , '01' /* 창구거래 */ , '01' /* 현금 */ , '22' , NVL(A.CASH_TRDG_AMNT, 0) AS CASH_RCPS_AMNT /* 현금거래금액 */ , NVL(F.DTBR_CODE, ' ') /* 처리점코드 */ , A.PRBN_ENTY_ID /* 처리점ID */ , NVL(A.RLTV_FNC_ACNT_NO_CRYP , '') /* 은행계좌번호 */ , NVL(B.BANK_NAME , '') /* 은행코드명 */ , NVL(B.BANK_CODE , '') /* 은행코드 */ , A.TRDG_DATE
FROM SID.IDO_A_MBP_BNKN_TRDG_DTLD A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS E1 ON RTRIM(A.ASPR_RNNO_CRYP) = RTRIM(E1.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP) LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUS_BANK B ON A.RLBK_CODE = B.BANK_CODE WHERE A.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND A.TRDG_CODE IN ('902270','902530', '903310','903340')/* 은행송금, 가상계좌입금(2014-06-12 902530 추가) */ -- AND NVL(A.CASH_TRDG_AMNT, 0) > 1000000 /* 현금거래금액 */ AND A.TRRC_SECT_CODE = '1' /* 송수신구분코드 */ /*AND A.TNFR_TRDG_CODE = '202000' 이체업무구분코드 2014-06-12 삭제*/ AND A.CANC_YN ='N' AND A.BANK_PRCE_STAS_CODE ='1' /* 은행처리결과구분코드 */
UNION ALL
SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) > 0 then (SELECT AA.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS AA , SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY BB WHERE AA.ENTY_ID = BB.ENTY_ID AND AA.ENTY_ID = NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) AND AA.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('CRGN') ) ELSE NVL(D.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, '') END , /* 의뢰인고객번호 */ A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID AS ENTY_ID, B.ACNT_OWNR_ID , /* 고객ID */ B.ACNT_NO_CRYP , /* 계좌번호 */ B.ACNT_ID , /* 계좌ID */ '1' , CASE WHEN A.SBSN_SECT_CODE = 'LOS' THEN '900190' /* 청약구분코드: 실권주현금청약 */ WHEN A.SBSN_SECT_CODE = 'BND' THEN '900170' /* 청약구분코드: 사채현금청약 */ ELSE ' ' END , '01' , /* 창구거래 */ '01' , /* 현금 */ '99' , NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) AS CASH_RCPS_AMNT , /* 현금금액 */ NVL(F.DTBR_CODE, ' ') , /* 처리점코드 */ A.PRBN_ENTY_ID , /* 처리점ID */ '' , '' , '' , A.PRCE_DATE AS TRDG_DATE
FROM SID.IDO_A_MDI_ETC_SBSN A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B ON A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS D ON C.CLNT_ENTY_ID = D.ENTY_ID AND C.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE WHERE A.PRCE_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND A.SBSN_CANC_YN = 'N' /* 청약취소여부 */ AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND NVL(A.SBSN_FUNS_SECT_CODE, '') = 'CSH' /* 청약자금구분코드 */ AND A.SBSN_SECT_CODE IN ('LOS', 'BND') /* 청약구분코드 이거 7번은 먼지 꼭 확인할것 (실권주랑 채권청약)*/ AND A.SBSN_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE = 'A01' AND A.LAST_TRDG_YN = 'Y' /* 최종거래여부 */ -- AND NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) >= 1000000 /* 현금금액 */
UNION ALL
SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) > 0 then (SELECT AA.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS AA , SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY BB WHERE AA.ENTY_ID = BB.ENTY_ID AND AA.ENTY_ID = NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) AND AA.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('CRGN') ) ELSE NVL(D.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, '') END , /* 의뢰인고객번호 */ A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID AS ENTY_ID, B.ACNT_OWNR_ID , /* 고객ID */ B.ACNT_NO_CRYP , /* 계좌번호 */ B.ACNT_ID , /* 계좌ID */ '1' , '900210' , /* 공모주현금청약 */ '01' , /* 창구거래 */ '01' , /* 현금 */ '99' , NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) AS CASH_RCPS_AMNT , /* 현금금액 */ NVL(F.DTBR_CODE, ' ') , /* 처리점코드 */ A.PRBN_ENTY_ID , /* 처리점ID */ '' , '' , '' , A.PRCE_DATE AS TRDG_DATE
FROM SID.IDO_A_MDA_POS_SBSN A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B ON A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS D ON C.CLNT_ENTY_ID = D.ENTY_ID AND C.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE WHERE A.PRCE_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CANC_YN = 'N' /* 취소여부 */ AND NVL(A.SBSN_FUNS_SECT_CODE, '') = 'CSH' /* 청약자금구분코드 */ AND A.SBSN_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE = 'A01' AND A.LAST_TRDG_YN = 'Y' /* 최종거래여부 */ -- AND NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) >= 1000000 /* 현금금액 */
UNION ALL
SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) > 0 then (SELECT AA.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS AA , SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY BB WHERE AA.ENTY_ID = BB.ENTY_ID AND AA.ENTY_ID = NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) AND AA.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('CRGN') ) ELSE NVL(D.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, '') END , /* 의뢰인고객번호 */ A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID AS ENTY_ID, B.ACNT_OWNR_ID, B.ACNT_NO_CRYP , /* 계좌번호 */ B.ACNT_ID , /* 계좌ID */ '1' , '900720' , /* 유상현금청약 */ '01' , /* 창구거래 */ '01' , /* 현금 */ '99' , NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) AS CASH_RCPS_AMNT , /* 현금금액 */ NVL(F.DTBR_CODE, ' ') , /* 처리점코드 */ A.PRBN_ENTY_ID , /* 처리점ID */ '' , '' , '' , A.SBSN_DATE AS TRDG_DATE
FROM SID.IDO_A_MDM_DMSC_SBSN A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B ON A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS D ON C.CLNT_ENTY_ID = D.ENTY_ID AND C.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE WHERE A.SBSN_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} /* 청약일자 */ AND NVL(A.PDN_CASH_SECT_CODE, '') = 'CSH' /* 유상현금구분코드 */ AND B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CANC_YN = 'N' /* 취소여부 */ AND A.RGHT_CRCT_SECT_CODE = 'COM' /* 유통구분코드 */ -- AND NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) >= 1000000 /* 현금금액 */
UNION ALL
SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) > 0 then (SELECT AA.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS AA , SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY BB WHERE AA.ENTY_ID = BB.ENTY_ID AND AA.ENTY_ID = NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) AND AA.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('CRGN') ) ELSE NVL(D.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, '') END , /* 의뢰인고객번호 */ A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID AS ENTY_ID, B.ACNT_OWNR_ID , /* 고객ID */ B.ACNT_NO_CRYP , /* 계좌번호 */ B.ACNT_ID , /* 계좌ID */ '1' , '900120' , /* ELS현금청약(사모) */ '01' , /* 창구거래 */ '01' , /* 현금 */ '99' , NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) AS CASH_RCPS_AMNT , /* 현금금액 */ NVL(F.DTBR_CODE, ' ') , /* 처리점코드 */ A.PRBN_ENTY_ID , /* 처리점ID */ '' , '' , '' , A.PRCE_DATE AS TRDG_DATE
FROM SID.IDO_A_MDH_DRVT_SBSN A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B ON A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS D ON C.CLNT_ENTY_ID = D.ENTY_ID AND C.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE WHERE A.PRCE_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND A.SBSN_CANC_YN = 'N' AND NVL(A.SBSN_FUNS_SECT_CODE, '') = 'CSH' AND B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.SBSN_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE = 'A01' AND A.LAST_TRDG_YN = 'Y' -- AND NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) >= 1000000
UNION ALL
SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) > 0 then (SELECT AA.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS AA , SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY BB WHERE AA.ENTY_ID = BB.ENTY_ID AND AA.ENTY_ID = NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) AND AA.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('CRGN') ) ELSE NVL(A.CLNT_RNNO_CRYP, '') END , /* 의뢰인고객번호 */ A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID AS ENTY_ID, B.ACNT_OWNR_ID , B.ACNT_NO_CRYP , /* 계좌번호 */ B.ACNT_ID , /* 계좌ID */ '1' , '900720' , /* 유상현금청약 */ '01' , /* 창구거래 */ '01' , /* 현금 */ '99' , NVL(SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) AS CASH_RCPS_AMNT , /* 현금금액 */ NVL(F.DTBR_CODE, ' ') , /* 처리점코드 */ A.PRBN_ENTY_ID , /* 처리점ID */ '' , '' , '' , A.PRCE_DATE AS TRDG_DATE
FROM SID.IDO_A_MDC_HLDR_SBSN A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID , SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B, SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C WHERE A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID AND B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.PRCE_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND A.CANC_YN = 'N' AND A.LAST_TRDG_YN = 'Y' -- AND NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) >= 1000000
) ZZ
-- GROUP BY SUBSTR(ZZ.TRDG_DATE, 1, 6) -- AND ENTY_ID = 0
) Y ) AS IN_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,#{J1_S_DT} AS SMMT_STRT_DT -- 집계기준시작일 ,#{J1_E_DT} AS SMMT_END_DT -- 집계기준종료일 FROM DUAL

-- I.1.07.01 : 고위험업종 개인사업자 규모 INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I (BAS_YYMM,JIPYO_IDX,IN_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME,SMMT_STRT_DT,SMMT_END_DT) SELECT SUBSTR(#{J1_E_DT},1,6) AS BAS_YYMM -- 기준년월 ,'I.1.07.01' AS JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,( SELECT CNT FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID) AS CNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') -- 리테일계좌만 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B WHERE B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND B.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ ) AND D.PRCE_DATE <= #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 고객등록일자 AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') -- 등급 존재 AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- CDD고객구분코드(1.개인, 2.영리법인, 3.비영리법인) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT AA INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT_FUNCTION AF ON AA.ACNT_ID = AF.ACNT_ID AND AF.ACNT_FNCN_TYPE_CODE = 'PRBS' -- 개인사업용계좌 AND AF.ALWD_YN = 'Y' WHERE AA.ACNT_OWNR_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND AA.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 ) --AND A.JOB_CODE IN ('250','260','270','280','410','420','430','440','450','940') AND A.JOB_CODE IN (SELECT TRIM(I.RISK_DTLS_CODE) FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_RISK_INDR_MN I WHERE 1 = 1 AND I.RISK_LARG_CLSN_CODE = 'CLNT' AND I.RISK_MDUM_CLSN_CODE = 'JOB' AND I.CDD_RGTY_RISK_SECT_CODE = 'Y' ) ) WHERE 1 = 1 ) AS IN_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,#{J1_S_DT} AS SMMT_STRT_DT -- 집계기준시작일 ,#{J1_E_DT} AS SMMT_END_DT -- 집계기준종료일 FROM DUAL

--I1_07_02 INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I (BAS_YYMM,JIPYO_IDX,IN_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME,SMMT_STRT_DT,SMMT_END_DT)
SELECT SUBSTR(#{J1_E_DT},1,6) AS BAS_YYMM -- 기준년월 ,'I.1.07.02' AS JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,( SELECT NVL(ROUND(SUM(ZZ.TRDG_AMNT) / 1000000, 2),0) AS RSLT_VALU FROM ( SELECT T.ACNT_ID , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('3', '4') THEN T.BFTX_KRW_TRDG_AMNT -- 입출금 ELSE T.TRDG_DNOM_AMNT END AS TRDG_AMNT -- 입출고 , TC.TRDG_CODE , TC.DTLS_TRDG_NAME , T.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE , T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG T INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD TC ON TC.TRDG_CODE = T.TRDG_CODE AND TC.DTLS_TRDG_NAME NOT LIKE '%대차%' WHERE T.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND T.TRDG_CODE >= '300000' AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT LIKE '%9' AND T.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND T.CRNY_CODE IN ('KRW', ' ', '') AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT IN('301180' ,'301189' ,'301420' ,'301430' ,'301439' ,'301440' ,'301449' ,'301450' ,'301459' ,'301460','301469' ,'301890' ,'301899' ,'301900' ,'301909' ,'301910' ,'301919' ,'301920' ,'301929' ,'302230' ,'302239','302240' ,'302249' ,'303910' ,'303919' ,'A99010' ,'Q00400' ,'Q00800' ,'T00030' ,'U00080' ,'U00200' ,'U00500') AND T.ACNT_TRDG_KIND_CODE <> '14' -- 주석거래(관리점변경, 통장기장 등) AND T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE NOT LIKE 'B%' -- 배치거래 제외
UNION ALL
SELECT T.ACNT_ID , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('3', '4') THEN T.BFTX_FRGN_CRNY_TRDG_AMNT * (A.DATA_VALU / B.BAS_SCLG_FCTR) -- 입출금 ELSE T.TRDG_DLNG_UNIT_PRIC * T.TRDG_PRCE_QNTY * (A.DATA_VALU / B.BAS_SCLG_FCTR) END AS TRDG_AMNT -- 입출고 , TC.TRDG_CODE , TC.DTLS_TRDG_NAME , T.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE , T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG T INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD TC ON TC.TRDG_CODE = T.TRDG_CODE AND TC.DTLS_TRDG_NAME NOT LIKE '%대차%' INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUM_MARKET_DATA A ON A.BSNS_DATE = T.TRDG_DATE AND A.PRIC_TYPE_CODE = 'BKR' -- 가격유형코드(BKR.한국은행고시환율) AND A.DATA_VALU_TYPE_CODE = 'XCR' -- 데이터값유형코드(XCR.환율) AND A.DATA_SORC_ENTY_ID = 102001 -- 블룸버그 AND A.EOD_TYPE_CODE = 'SNP' -- EOD유형코드(EOD.EOD, SNP.스냅샷) INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUP_CURRENCY_PAIR B ON A.PRDT_ID = B.PRDT_ID AND B.BAS_CRNY_CODE = 'KRW' AND B.TAGT_CRNY_CODE = T.CRNY_CODE WHERE T.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND T.TRDG_CODE >= '300000' AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT LIKE '%9' AND T.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND (T.CRNY_CODE <> 'KRW' AND T.CRNY_CODE <> ' ' AND T.CRNY_CODE IS NOT NULL) AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT IN('301180' ,'301189' ,'301420' ,'301430' ,'301439' ,'301440' ,'301449' ,'301450' ,'301459' ,'301460','301469' ,'301890' ,'301899' ,'301900' ,'301909' ,'301910' ,'301919' ,'301920' ,'301929' ,'302230' ,'302239','302240' ,'302249' ,'303910' ,'303919' ,'A99010' ,'Q00400' ,'Q00800' ,'T00030' ,'U00080' ,'U00200' ,'U00500') AND T.ACNT_TRDG_KIND_CODE <> '14' -- 주석거래(관리점변경, 통장기장 등) AND T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE NOT LIKE 'B%' -- 배치거래 제외
) ZZ , ( SELECT C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AS ENTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D -- 고객등록일자 확인용 ON C.CLNT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND D.PRCE_DATE <= #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 고객등록일자
INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD E -- CDD수행내역 ON C.CLNT_ENTY_ID = E.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID --AND E.JOB_CODE IN ('250','260','270','280','410','420','430','440','450','940') AND E.JOB_CODE IN (SELECT TRIM(I.RISK_DTLS_CODE) FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_RISK_INDR_MN I WHERE 1 = 1 AND I.RISK_LARG_CLSN_CODE = 'CLNT' AND I.RISK_MDUM_CLSN_CODE = 'JOB' AND I.CDD_RGTY_RISK_SECT_CODE = 'Y' )
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B WHERE B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = E.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND B.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ )
WHERE 1 = 1 -- C.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE = 'IN' AND E.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- CDD고객구분코드(1.개인, 2.영리법인, 3.비영리법인) -- AND C.JOB_CODE IN ('260','270','280','410','420','430','440','450','940') -- 고객정보로는 한명도 안나와서 CDD정보로 하기로 함 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT AA INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT_FUNCTION AF ON AA.ACNT_ID = AF.ACNT_ID AND AF.ACNT_FNCN_TYPE_CODE = 'PRBS' -- 개인사업용계좌 AND AF.ALWD_YN = 'Y' WHERE AA.ACNT_OWNR_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND AA.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE <> 'CL' -- 폐쇄계좌제외 ) ) XX , SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT AC WHERE 1 = 1 AND AC.ACNT_OWNR_ID = XX.ENTY_ID AND AC.ACNT_ID = ZZ.ACNT_ID
) X ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,#{J1_S_DT} AS SMMT_STRT_DT -- 집계기준시작일 ,#{J1_E_DT} AS SMMT_END_DT -- 집계기준종료일 FROM DUAL

-- I.1.07.03 : 고위험업종 법인고객 규모 INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I (BAS_YYMM,JIPYO_IDX,IN_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME,SMMT_STRT_DT,SMMT_END_DT) SELECT SUBSTR(#{J1_E_DT},1,6) AS BAS_YYMM -- 기준년월 ,'I.1.07.03' AS JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,(
SELECT /*+ FULL(A) */ COUNT(DISTINCT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID) AS RSLT_VALU FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') -- 리테일계좌만 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID )
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B WHERE B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND B.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ ) AND D.PRCE_DATE <= #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 고객등록일자 AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') -- 등급 존재 AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2') -- CDD고객구분코드(1.개인, 2.영리법인, 3.비영리법인)
--AND A.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE IN ('33110','46492','47830','47841','68221','71101','71103','71109','71201','71202','71209','71531','91221','91249','94911','94912','94913', -- '94914','94919','94939','94990','96112','96113','96119','96122','96129','96921','96991','96992','96994','99996','99997','99998','99999' -- ) AND A.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE IN ( SELECT TRIM(I.RISK_DTLS_CODE) FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_RISK_INDR_MN I WHERE 1 = 1 AND I.RISK_LARG_CLSN_CODE = 'CLNT' AND I.RISK_MDUM_CLSN_CODE = 'INKN' AND I.CDD_RGTY_RISK_SECT_CODE = 'Y' ) ) IN_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,#{J1_S_DT} AS SMMT_STRT_DT -- 집계기준시작일 ,#{J1_E_DT} AS SMMT_END_DT -- 집계기준종료일 FROM DUAL

-- I.1.07.04 : 고위험업종 법인 거래금액 규모 INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I (BAS_YYMM,JIPYO_IDX,IN_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME,SMMT_STRT_DT,SMMT_END_DT) SELECT SUBSTR(#{J1_E_DT},1,6) AS BAS_YYMM -- 기준년월 ,'I.1.07.04' AS JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,( SELECT ROUND(SUM(ZZ.TRDG_AMNT) / 1000000, 2) AS RSLT_VALU FROM ( SELECT /*+ FULL(T) PARALLEL(T 8) */ T.ACNT_ID , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('3', '4') THEN T.BFTX_KRW_TRDG_AMNT -- 입출금 ELSE T.TRDG_DNOM_AMNT END AS TRDG_AMNT -- 입출고 , TC.TRDG_CODE , TC.DTLS_TRDG_NAME , T.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE , T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG T INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD TC ON TC.TRDG_CODE = T.TRDG_CODE AND TC.DTLS_TRDG_NAME NOT LIKE '%대차%' WHERE T.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND T.TRDG_CODE >= '300000' AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT LIKE '%9' AND T.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND T.CRNY_CODE IN ('KRW', ' ', '') AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT IN('301180' ,'301189' ,'301420' ,'301430' ,'301439' ,'301440' ,'301449' ,'301450' ,'301459' ,'301460','301469' ,'301890' ,'301899' ,'301900' ,'301909' ,'301910' ,'301919' ,'301920' ,'301929' ,'302230' ,'302239','302240' ,'302249' ,'303910' ,'303919' ,'A99010' ,'Q00400' ,'Q00800' ,'T00030' ,'U00080' ,'U00200' ,'U00500') AND T.ACNT_TRDG_KIND_CODE <> '14' -- 주석거래(관리점변경, 통장기장 등) AND T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE NOT LIKE 'B%' -- 배치거래 제외
UNION ALL
SELECT /*+ FULL(B) PARALLEL(B 8) */ T.ACNT_ID , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('3', '4') THEN T.BFTX_FRGN_CRNY_TRDG_AMNT * (A.DATA_VALU / B.BAS_SCLG_FCTR) -- 입출금 ELSE T.TRDG_DLNG_UNIT_PRIC * T.TRDG_PRCE_QNTY * (A.DATA_VALU / B.BAS_SCLG_FCTR) END AS TRDG_AMNT -- 입출고 , TC.TRDG_CODE , TC.DTLS_TRDG_NAME , T.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE , T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG T INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD TC ON TC.TRDG_CODE = T.TRDG_CODE AND TC.DTLS_TRDG_NAME NOT LIKE '%대차%' INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUM_MARKET_DATA A ON A.BSNS_DATE = T.TRDG_DATE AND A.PRIC_TYPE_CODE = 'BKR' -- 가격유형코드(BKR.한국은행고시환율) AND A.DATA_VALU_TYPE_CODE = 'XCR' -- 데이터값유형코드(XCR.환율) AND A.DATA_SORC_ENTY_ID = 102001 -- 블룸버그 AND A.EOD_TYPE_CODE = 'SNP' -- EOD유형코드(EOD.EOD, SNP.스냅샷) INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUP_CURRENCY_PAIR B ON A.PRDT_ID = B.PRDT_ID AND B.BAS_CRNY_CODE = 'KRW' AND B.TAGT_CRNY_CODE = T.CRNY_CODE WHERE T.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND T.TRDG_CODE >= '300000' AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT LIKE '%9' AND T.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND (T.CRNY_CODE <> 'KRW' AND T.CRNY_CODE <> ' ' AND T.CRNY_CODE IS NOT NULL) AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT IN('301180' ,'301189' ,'301420' ,'301430' ,'301439' ,'301440' ,'301449' ,'301450' ,'301459' ,'301460','301469' ,'301890' ,'301899' ,'301900' ,'301909' ,'301910' ,'301919' ,'301920' ,'301929' ,'302230' ,'302239','302240' ,'302249' ,'303910' ,'303919' ,'A99010' ,'Q00400' ,'Q00800' ,'T00030' ,'U00080' ,'U00200' ,'U00500') AND T.ACNT_TRDG_KIND_CODE <> '14' -- 주석거래(관리점변경, 통장기장 등) AND T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE NOT LIKE 'B%' -- 배치거래 제외
) ZZ , ( SELECT C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AS ENTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D -- 고객등록일자 확인용 ON C.CLNT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND D.PRCE_DATE <= #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 고객등록일자
INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD E -- CDD수행내역 ON C.CLNT_ENTY_ID = E.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID --AND E.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE IN ('33110','46492','47830','47841','68221','71101','71103','71109','71201','71202','71209','71531','91221','91249','94911','94912','94913', -- '94914','94919','94939','94990','96112','96113','96119','96122','96129','96921','96991','96992','96994','99996','99997','99998','99999' -- ) AND E.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE IN ( SELECT TRIM(I.RISK_DTLS_CODE) FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_RISK_INDR_MN I WHERE 1 = 1 AND I.RISK_LARG_CLSN_CODE = 'CLNT' AND I.RISK_MDUM_CLSN_CODE = 'INKN' AND I.CDD_RGTY_RISK_SECT_CODE = 'Y' ) AND E.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '2' -- CDD고객구분코드 : 1.개인, 2.영리법인, 3.비영리법인
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B WHERE B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = E.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND B.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ )
WHERE 1 = 1 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT A WHERE A.ACNT_OWNR_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE <> 'CL' -- 폐쇄계좌제외 ) ) XX , SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT AC WHERE 1 = 1 AND AC.ACNT_OWNR_ID = XX.ENTY_ID AND AC.ACNT_ID = ZZ.ACNT_ID
) IN_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,#{J1_S_DT} AS SMMT_STRT_DT -- 집계기준시작일 ,#{J1_E_DT} AS SMMT_END_DT -- 집계기준종료일 FROM DUAL

-- I.3.08.01 : 고객당 현금 거래 금액 규모 INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I (BAS_YYMM,JIPYO_IDX,IN_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME,SMMT_STRT_DT,SMMT_END_DT)
SELECT SUBSTR(#{J1_E_DT},1,6) AS BAS_YYMM -- 기준년월 ,'I.3.08.01' AS JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,( -- 3개월 현금거래 고객수 : 52056명 -- 3개월 현금거래금액 : 184753505437원 -- 184753505437원 / 52056명 / 1000000원 = 33.54912988775549408329491317043184263101 백만원
SELECT ROUND(NULLIF(A.TOTAL_SUM,0) / NULLIF(A.TOTAL_CNT,0) / 1000000, 2) AS RSLT_VALU FROM (
-- 3개월 현금거래 고객수 : 52056명 -- 3개월 현금거래금액 : 184753505437원 -- 184753505437원 / 52056명 / 1000000원 = 33.54912988775549408329491317043184263101 백만원
-- SELECT 184753505437 / 52056 / 1000000 FROM DUAL;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN ZZ.ACNT_OWNR_ID = 0 THEN ZZ.ENTY_ID ELSE ZZ.ACNT_OWNR_ID END)) AS TOTAL_CNT -- 현금거래 고객수 , NVL(SUM(ZZ.CASH_RCPS_AMNT),0) AS TOTAL_SUM
-- , ZZ.ENTY_ID -- , ZZ.ACNT_OWNR_ID -- , ZZ.CASH_RCPS_AMNT FROM (
SELECT CASE WHEN A.ASPR_CLNT_RNNO_CRYP > ' ' THEN A.ASPR_CLNT_RNNO_CRYP ELSE NVL(E.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, ' ') END /* E1 2017-05-18 추가 */ , NVL(E1.ENTY_ID,0) AS ENTY_ID /* 의뢰인고객번호고객번호*/ , B.ACNT_OWNR_ID /* 고객ID */ , B.ACNT_NO_CRYP /* 계좌번호 */ , A.ACNT_ID /* 계좌ID */ , A.RAPA_SECT_CODE /* 입출금구분코드 */ , A.TRDG_CODE /* 거래코드 */ , '01' /* 거래채널 */ , '01' /* 현금 */ , '12' /* 비우면 에러남.. 매체필수 아니므로 22로 채움 */ , NVL(A.CASH_RCPS_AMNT , 0 ) AS CASH_RCPS_AMNT /* 현금출납금액 */ , NVL(A1.DTBR_CODE , '') /* 처리점코드 */ , A.PRBN_ENTY_ID /* 처리점엔티티ID */ , CASE WHEN NVL(RTRIM(A.MEDI_ACKN_YN), 'Y') != 'Y' THEN B.ACNT_NO_CRYP ELSE ' ' END/* 수취인계좌번호 */ , CASE WHEN NVL(RTRIM(A.MEDI_ACKN_YN), 'Y') != 'Y' THEN '삼성증권' ELSE ' ' END /* 수취인금융기관명 */ , CASE WHEN NVL(RTRIM(A.MEDI_ACKN_YN), 'Y') != 'Y' THEN '240' ELSE ' ' END /* 비계좌(기타) + 영수*/ , A.TRDG_DATE
FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG_RAPA A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT A1 ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = A1.ENTY_ID /* E1 2017-05-18 추가 */ LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS E1 ON RTRIM(A.ASPR_CLNT_RNNO_CRYP) = RTRIM(E1.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP) /* 물리적 Key는 아니나 UK 보장 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_ENTY_NAME C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN D LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS E ON D.CLNT_ENTY_ID = E.ENTY_ID AND D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = E.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE WHERE A.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID AND B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = C.ENTY_ID AND B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND A.RAPA_SECT_CODE = '1' /* 입출금구분코드 */ AND A.TRDG_CODE IN ('300060', '300050', '300020') /* 비저축현금입금, 입금, 현금입금(신탁)*/ AND A.RAPA_NO > 0 /* 입출금번호 */ AND NVL(A.CASH_RCPS_AMNT, 0) > 0 /* 현금출납금액 */ -- AND (A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE IN ('A02', 'A03') /* 처리채널구분코드 */ -- OR (A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE NOT IN ('A02', 'A03') /* 처리채널구분코드 */ -- AND A.CASH_RCPS_AMNT > 1000000 ) ) /* 현금출납금액 */
AND C.ENTY_NAME_TYPE_CODE = 'NM' AND C.LANG_CODE = 'KO'
UNION ALL
SELECT CASE WHEN RTRIM(A.ASPR_CLNT_RNNO_CRYP) > ' ' THEN RTRIM(A.ASPR_CLNT_RNNO_CRYP) ELSE NVL(E.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, ' ') END /* E1 2017-05-18 추가 */ , NVL(E1.ENTY_ID,0) AS ENTY_ID /* 의뢰인고객번호고객번호*/ , B.ACNT_OWNR_ID /* 고객ID */ , B.ACNT_NO_CRYP /* 계좌번호 */ , A.ACNT_ID /* 계좌ID */ , A.RAPA_SECT_CODE /* 입출금구분코드 */ , A.TRDG_CODE , '01' /* 거래채널 */ , '01' /* 현금 */ , '11' , NVL(A.CASH_RCPS_AMNT , 0 ) AS CASH_RCPS_AMNT /* 현금출납금액 */ , NVL(A1.DTBR_CODE , '') /* 처리점코드 */ , A.PRBN_ENTY_ID /* 처리점엔티티ID */ , '' , '' , '' , A.TRDG_DATE
FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG_RAPA A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT A1 ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = A1.ENTY_ID /* E1 2017-05-18 추가 */ LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS E1 ON RTRIM(A.ASPR_CLNT_RNNO_CRYP) = RTRIM(E1.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP) /* 물리적 Key는 아니나 UK 보장 */ , SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN D LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS E ON D.CLNT_ENTY_ID = E.ENTY_ID AND D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = E.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE
WHERE A.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID AND B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND A.RAPA_SECT_CODE = '2' /* 입출금구분코드 */ AND A.TRDG_CODE IN ('400210','400120','400070','400020','400280','400260','400240','400220', '400060','400050','400040','400030','400020') /* 출금, 폐쇄출금,출금(신탁),폐쇄출금(신탁),책임자출금(기타),책임자출금(압류),책임자출금(카드발급전) */ /* 책임자출금(폐쇄계좌),책임자출금(기타-신탁),책임자출금(압류-신탁),책임자출금(카드발급전-신탁) */ /* 책임자출금(폐쇄계좌-신탁),폐쇄출금(신탁) */ AND A.RAPA_NO > 0 AND NVL(A.CASH_RCPS_AMNT, 0) > 0 /* 현금출납금액 */
UNION ALL
/* CD기 출금 * 2014-06-12 * 거래코드 추가 * 401000(은행CD기매도출금) -> 거래발생x ( 2013년기준 ) 402700(VAN-CD기출금) -> 거래발생됨( 2013년기준 - 점외 CD기) : 이체거래코드 : 214000 402710(시간외VAN-CD기출금) -> 거래발생됨( 2013년기준 - 점외 CD기) : 이체거래코드 : 214000 402720(365VAN-CD기출금) -> 거래발생됨( 2013년기준 - 점외 CD기) : 이체거래코드 : 214000 402910(시간외증권CD기출금) -> 거래발생됨( 2013년기준 - 객장 CD기) : 이체거래코드 : 214000 403090(365증권CD기출금) -> 거래발생됨( 2013년기준 - 객장 CD기) : 이체거래코드 : 214000 403380(증권CD기현금출금(당사)(취급)) -> 거래발생x ( 2013년기준 ) 902580(증권CD기현금출금(타사)(취급)) -> 거래발생x ( 2013년기준 ) 403220(은행CD기현금출금(개설)) -> 거래발생됨( 2013년기준 - CD공동망 ) : 이체거래코드 : 201000 * 2017-05-18 * CD기 출금거래 : 당사ATM/VAN 출금, 삼성가상계좌ATM/VAN출금, 삼성페이ATM출금, 삼성페이은행CD기 출금 404640(CD기(삼성페이)출금) 404690(은행CD기(삼성페이)출금) * * CTR_CASH_AMNT -> CASH_TRDG_AMNT 수정 * */ SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(RTRIM(A.ASPR_RNNO_CRYP), '') = '' THEN (NVL(E.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, '')) ELSE NVL(RTRIM(A.ASPR_RNNO_CRYP), '') END , /* 고객번호 */ 0 AS ENTY_ID, B.ACNT_OWNR_ID , /* 고객ID */ B.ACNT_NO_CRYP , /* 계좌번호 */ A.ACNT_ID , /* 증권사계좌번호 */ '2' , A.TRDG_CODE , '02' , /* 창구거래 */ '01' , /* 현금 */ '11' , NVL(A.CASH_TRDG_AMNT , 0) AS CASH_RCPS_AMNT , /* CTR현금금액 */ NVL(F.DTBR_CODE , ' ') , /* 처리점코드 */ A.PRBN_ENTY_ID , /* 처리점ID */ NVL(A.RLTV_FNC_ACNT_NO_CRYP , ''), /* 은행계좌번호 */ NVL(C.BANK_NAME , ''), /* 은행코드명 */ NVL(C.BANK_CODE , '') /* 은행코드 */ , A.TRDG_DATE
FROM SID.IDO_A_MBP_BNKN_TRDG_DTLD A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B ON A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUS_BANK C ON A.RLTV_BANK_BNCD = C.BANK_CODE , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN D LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS E ON D.CLNT_ENTY_ID = E.ENTY_ID AND D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = E.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE
WHERE A.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND A.TRDG_CODE IN ('401010', '400950', '400930', '400850', '402550', '401000', '402700', '402710', '402720', '402910', '403090', '403380', '902580', '403220', /*은행CD기출금, CD기출금, 마감후은행CD기출금, 365은행CD기출금, VAN-CD기출금 추가 */ '404640', '404690') /*삼성페이 ATM-은행CD출금 */ AND NVL(A.CASH_TRDG_AMNT, 0) > 0 /* CTR현금금액 */ AND A.TRRC_SECT_CODE = '2' /* 송수신구분코드 */ /*AND A.TNFR_TRDG_CODE IN ('204000','205000') 이체업무구분코드(2014-06-12 의미없어 삭제함) */ AND A.CANC_YN = 'N' AND A.BANK_PRCE_STAS_CODE = '1' /* 은행처리결과구분코드 */ AND B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
UNION ALL
/* CD기 입금 * 2014-06-12 * 302570(VAN-CD기입금) -> 거래발생X ( 2013년기준 ) 302580(시간외VAN-CD기입금) -> 거래발생X ( 2013년기준 ) 302850(증권CD기입금) -> 거래발생됨 ( 2013년기준 - 롯데ATM ) : 이체거래코드 : 111000 302860(시간외증권CD기입금) -> 거래발생됨 ( 2013년기준 - 롯데ATM ) : 이체거래코드 : 111000 302960(365증권CD기입금) -> 거래발생됨 ( 2013년기준 - 롯데ATM ) : 이체거래코드 : 111000 303100(증권CD기현금입금(취급)) -> 거래발생X ( 2013년기준 ) 303000(은행CD기현금입금) -> 거래발생됨 ( 2013년기준 - CD공동망) : 이체거래코드 : 103000 * 2017-05-18 * CD기 입금거래 : 당사ATM/VAN 입금, 삼성가상계좌ATM/VAN입금, 삼성페이ATM입금, 삼성페이은행CD기 입금 304250(CD기(삼성페이)입금) 304290(은행CD기(삼성페이)입금) * CTR_CASH_AMNT -> CASH_TRDG_AMNT 수정 * */ SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(RTRIM(A.ASPR_RNNO_CRYP), '') = '' THEN (NVL(E.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, '')) ELSE NVL(RTRIM(A.ASPR_RNNO_CRYP), '') END , /* 고객번호 */ 0 AS ENTY_ID, B.ACNT_OWNR_ID , /* 고객ID */ B.ACNT_NO_CRYP , /* 계좌번호 */ A.ACNT_ID , /* 계좌ID */ '1' , A.TRDG_CODE , '02' , /* 창구거래 */ '01' , /* 현금 */ '12' , NVL(A.CASH_TRDG_AMNT, 0) AS CASH_RCPS_AMNT , /* CTR현금금액 */ NVL(F.DTBR_CODE, ' ') , /* 처리점코드 */ A.PRBN_ENTY_ID , /* 처리점ID */ NVL(A.RLTV_FNC_ACNT_NO_CRYP , '') , /* 은행계좌번호 */ NVL(C.BANK_NAME , '') , /* 은행코드명 */ NVL(C.BANK_CODE , '') /* 은행코드 */ , A.TRDG_DATE
FROM SID.IDO_A_MBP_BNKN_TRDG_DTLD A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B ON A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUS_BANK C ON A.RLTV_BANK_BNCD = C.BANK_CODE , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN D LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS E ON D.CLNT_ENTY_ID = E.ENTY_ID AND D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = E.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE
WHERE A.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND A.TRDG_CODE IN ('300440', '302570', '302580', '302850', '302860', '302960', '303100', '303000',/* 은행 CD기 입금 */ '304250', '304290')/* 삼성페이 CD기 입금 */ /****************** 2008.06.13 이체입금 빼달라고 해서 변경 AND A.TRDG_CODE IN ('300440', '300500', '300380', '300320', '300310', '300280') 은행CD기입금, 은행이체입금, 마감후은행이체입금, 365은행이체입금, 은행이체입금(신탁), 마감후은행이체입금(신탁) ********************/ AND NVL(A.CASH_TRDG_AMNT, 0) > 0 AND A.TRRC_SECT_CODE ='2' /* 송수신구분코드 */ /*AND A.TNFR_TRDG_CODE IN ('101000','102000') 이체업무구분코드 2014-06-12 불필요하여 삭제 */ AND A.CANC_YN = 'N' AND A.BANK_PRCE_STAS_CODE = '1' /* 은행처리결과구분코드 */ AND B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
UNION ALL
/* 송금 * 2014-06-12 송금정보에는 계좌id가 없어서 uua_acnt 조인조건 없앰 * ASPR_RNNO_CRYP -> RMPR_RNNO_CRYP 로 수정 * 2014-06-12 가상계좌창구입금 추가. * 2017-05-18 계좌주id 쿼리 수정 * 2017-06-01 의뢰인실명번호 가져오도록 수정.(안세혁) * 2018-02-08 송금내역 조회 시 SELECT 컬럼 변경. 의뢰인명 -> 수취인명.(안세혁) * */
/* SELECT A.RMPR_RNNO_CRYP , 고객번호*/ /* SELECT CASE WHEN A.RMPR_RNNO_CRYP <> ' ' THEN A.RMPR_RNNO_CRYP ELSE A.ASPR_RNNO_CRYP END * , E1.ENTY_ID */ SELECT A.ASPR_RNNO_CRYP , E1.ENTY_ID AS ENTY_ID , 0 , ' ' /* 계좌번호 */ , A.ACNT_ID /* 계좌ID */ , '1' , A.TRDG_CODE , '01' /* 창구거래 */ , '01' /* 현금 */ , '22' , NVL(A.CASH_TRDG_AMNT, 0) AS CASH_RCPS_AMNT /* 현금거래금액 */ , NVL(F.DTBR_CODE, ' ') /* 처리점코드 */ , A.PRBN_ENTY_ID /* 처리점ID */ , NVL(A.RLTV_FNC_ACNT_NO_CRYP , '') /* 은행계좌번호 */ , NVL(B.BANK_NAME , '') /* 은행코드명 */ , NVL(B.BANK_CODE , '') /* 은행코드 */ , A.TRDG_DATE
FROM SID.IDO_A_MBP_BNKN_TRDG_DTLD A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS E1 ON RTRIM(A.ASPR_RNNO_CRYP) = RTRIM(E1.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP) LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUS_BANK B ON A.RLBK_CODE = B.BANK_CODE WHERE A.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND A.TRDG_CODE IN ('902270','902530', '903310','903340')/* 은행송금, 가상계좌입금(2014-06-12 902530 추가) */ -- AND NVL(A.CASH_TRDG_AMNT, 0) > 1000000 /* 현금거래금액 */ AND A.TRRC_SECT_CODE = '1' /* 송수신구분코드 */ /*AND A.TNFR_TRDG_CODE = '202000' 이체업무구분코드 2014-06-12 삭제*/ AND A.CANC_YN ='N' AND A.BANK_PRCE_STAS_CODE ='1' /* 은행처리결과구분코드 */
UNION ALL
SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) > 0 then (SELECT AA.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS AA , SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY BB WHERE AA.ENTY_ID = BB.ENTY_ID AND AA.ENTY_ID = NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) AND AA.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('CRGN') ) ELSE NVL(D.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, '') END , /* 의뢰인고객번호 */ A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID AS ENTY_ID, B.ACNT_OWNR_ID , /* 고객ID */ B.ACNT_NO_CRYP , /* 계좌번호 */ B.ACNT_ID , /* 계좌ID */ '1' , CASE WHEN A.SBSN_SECT_CODE = 'LOS' THEN '900190' /* 청약구분코드: 실권주현금청약 */ WHEN A.SBSN_SECT_CODE = 'BND' THEN '900170' /* 청약구분코드: 사채현금청약 */ ELSE ' ' END , '01' , /* 창구거래 */ '01' , /* 현금 */ '99' , NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) AS CASH_RCPS_AMNT , /* 현금금액 */ NVL(F.DTBR_CODE, ' ') , /* 처리점코드 */ A.PRBN_ENTY_ID , /* 처리점ID */ '' , '' , '' , A.PRCE_DATE AS TRDG_DATE
FROM SID.IDO_A_MDI_ETC_SBSN A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B ON A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS D ON C.CLNT_ENTY_ID = D.ENTY_ID AND C.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE WHERE A.PRCE_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND A.SBSN_CANC_YN = 'N' /* 청약취소여부 */ AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND NVL(A.SBSN_FUNS_SECT_CODE, '') = 'CSH' /* 청약자금구분코드 */ AND A.SBSN_SECT_CODE IN ('LOS', 'BND') /* 청약구분코드 이거 7번은 먼지 꼭 확인할것 (실권주랑 채권청약)*/ AND A.SBSN_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE = 'A01' AND A.LAST_TRDG_YN = 'Y' /* 최종거래여부 */ -- AND NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) >= 1000000 /* 현금금액 */
UNION ALL
SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) > 0 then (SELECT AA.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS AA , SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY BB WHERE AA.ENTY_ID = BB.ENTY_ID AND AA.ENTY_ID = NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) AND AA.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('CRGN') ) ELSE NVL(D.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, '') END , /* 의뢰인고객번호 */ A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID AS ENTY_ID, B.ACNT_OWNR_ID , /* 고객ID */ B.ACNT_NO_CRYP , /* 계좌번호 */ B.ACNT_ID , /* 계좌ID */ '1' , '900210' , /* 공모주현금청약 */ '01' , /* 창구거래 */ '01' , /* 현금 */ '99' , NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) AS CASH_RCPS_AMNT , /* 현금금액 */ NVL(F.DTBR_CODE, ' ') , /* 처리점코드 */ A.PRBN_ENTY_ID , /* 처리점ID */ '' , '' , '' , A.PRCE_DATE AS TRDG_DATE
FROM SID.IDO_A_MDA_POS_SBSN A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B ON A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS D ON C.CLNT_ENTY_ID = D.ENTY_ID AND C.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE WHERE A.PRCE_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CANC_YN = 'N' /* 취소여부 */ AND NVL(A.SBSN_FUNS_SECT_CODE, '') = 'CSH' /* 청약자금구분코드 */ AND A.SBSN_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE = 'A01' AND A.LAST_TRDG_YN = 'Y' /* 최종거래여부 */ -- AND NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) >= 1000000 /* 현금금액 */
UNION ALL
SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) > 0 then (SELECT AA.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS AA , SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY BB WHERE AA.ENTY_ID = BB.ENTY_ID AND AA.ENTY_ID = NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) AND AA.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('CRGN') ) ELSE NVL(D.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, '') END , /* 의뢰인고객번호 */ A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID AS ENTY_ID, B.ACNT_OWNR_ID, B.ACNT_NO_CRYP , /* 계좌번호 */ B.ACNT_ID , /* 계좌ID */ '1' , '900720' , /* 유상현금청약 */ '01' , /* 창구거래 */ '01' , /* 현금 */ '99' , NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) AS CASH_RCPS_AMNT , /* 현금금액 */ NVL(F.DTBR_CODE, ' ') , /* 처리점코드 */ A.PRBN_ENTY_ID , /* 처리점ID */ '' , '' , '' , A.SBSN_DATE AS TRDG_DATE
FROM SID.IDO_A_MDM_DMSC_SBSN A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B ON A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS D ON C.CLNT_ENTY_ID = D.ENTY_ID AND C.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE WHERE A.SBSN_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND NVL(A.PDN_CASH_SECT_CODE, '') = 'CSH' /* 유상현금구분코드 */ AND B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CANC_YN = 'N' /* 취소여부 */ AND A.RGHT_CRCT_SECT_CODE = 'COM' /* 유통구분코드 */ -- AND NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) >= 1000000 /* 현금금액 */
UNION ALL
SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) > 0 then (SELECT AA.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS AA , SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY BB WHERE AA.ENTY_ID = BB.ENTY_ID AND AA.ENTY_ID = NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) AND AA.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('CRGN') ) ELSE NVL(D.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP, '') END , /* 의뢰인고객번호 */ A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID AS ENTY_ID, B.ACNT_OWNR_ID , /* 고객ID */ B.ACNT_NO_CRYP , /* 계좌번호 */ B.ACNT_ID , /* 계좌ID */ '1' , '900120' , /* ELS현금청약(사모) */ '01' , /* 창구거래 */ '01' , /* 현금 */ '99' , NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) AS CASH_RCPS_AMNT , /* 현금금액 */ NVL(F.DTBR_CODE, ' ') , /* 처리점코드 */ A.PRBN_ENTY_ID , /* 처리점ID */ '' , '' , '' , A.PRCE_DATE AS TRDG_DATE
FROM SID.IDO_A_MDH_DRVT_SBSN A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B ON A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS D ON C.CLNT_ENTY_ID = D.ENTY_ID AND C.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE = D.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE WHERE A.PRCE_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND A.SBSN_CANC_YN = 'N' AND NVL(A.SBSN_FUNS_SECT_CODE, '') = 'CSH' AND B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.SBSN_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE = 'A01' AND A.LAST_TRDG_YN = 'Y' -- AND NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) >= 1000000
UNION ALL
SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) > 0 then (SELECT AA.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS AA , SID.IDO_A_UUE_LEGAL_ENTY BB WHERE AA.ENTY_ID = BB.ENTY_ID AND AA.ENTY_ID = NVL(A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID, 0) AND AA.ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('CRGN') ) ELSE NVL(A.CLNT_RNNO_CRYP, '') END , /* 의뢰인고객번호 */ A.ASKN_CLNT_ENTY_ID AS ENTY_ID, B.ACNT_OWNR_ID , B.ACNT_NO_CRYP , /* 계좌번호 */ B.ACNT_ID , /* 계좌ID */ '1' , '900720' , /* 유상현금청약 */ '01' , /* 창구거래 */ '01' , /* 현금 */ '99' , NVL(SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) AS CASH_RCPS_AMNT , /* 현금금액 */ NVL(F.DTBR_CODE, ' ') , /* 처리점코드 */ A.PRBN_ENTY_ID , /* 처리점ID */ '' , '' , '' , A.PRCE_DATE AS TRDG_DATE
FROM SID.IDO_A_MDC_HLDR_SBSN A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT F ON A.PRBN_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID , SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B, SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C WHERE A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID AND B.ACNT_OWNR_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.PRCE_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND A.CANC_YN = 'N' AND A.LAST_TRDG_YN = 'Y' -- AND NVL(A.SBSN_CASH_AMNT, 0) >= 1000000
) ZZ
WHERE 1 = 1 -- GROUP BY SUBSTR(ZZ.TRDG_DATE, 1, 6) -- AND ENTY_ID = 0
) A )X ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,#{J1_S_DT} AS SMMT_STRT_DT -- 집계기준시작일 ,#{J1_E_DT} AS SMMT_END_DT -- 집계기준종료일 FROM DUAL

-- I.4.01.02 전자금융서비스 가입자 규모 INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I (BAS_YYMM,JIPYO_IDX,IN_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME,SMMT_STRT_DT,SMMT_END_DT) SELECT SUBSTR(#{J1_E_DT},1,6) AS BAS_YYMM -- 기준년월 ,'I.4.01.02' AS JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ZZ.ENTY_ID) AS CNT FROM (
SELECT DISTINCT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AS ENTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') -- 리테일계좌만 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B WHERE B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND B.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ ) AND D.PRCE_DATE <= #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 고객등록일자 AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') -- 등급 존재
AND EXISTS (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(4)*/ 1 -- HTS약정 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAG_HTS_SVC H WHERE H.HTS_ID_CLNT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND H.RGSN_DATE <= #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AS ENTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') -- 리테일계좌만 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B WHERE B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND B.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ )
AND D.PRCE_DATE <= #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 고객등록일자 AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') -- 등급 존재 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAG_ACNT_ADDN_SVC X , SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT Y WHERE X.ACNT_ADSR_SECT_CODE = '02' -- ARS약정 AND X.ACNT_ID = Y.ACNT_ID AND Y.ACNT_OWNR_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND ((X.ACNT_SVC_RGSN_STAS_CODE = '1' -- 등록 AND X.RGSN_DATE <= #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) OR (X.ACNT_SVC_RGSN_STAS_CODE = '2' -- 해지 AND X.CNCN_DATE > #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) ) ) ZZ
) X
,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,#{J1_S_DT} AS SMMT_STRT_DT -- 집계기준시작일 ,#{J1_E_DT} AS SMMT_END_DT -- 집계기준종료일 FROM DUAL

-- I.4.01.03 전자금융 경로 이용 비율 INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I (BAS_YYMM,JIPYO_IDX,IN_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME,SMMT_STRT_DT,SMMT_END_DT) SELECT SUBSTR(#{J1_E_DT},1,6) AS BAS_YYMM -- 기준년월 ,'I.4.01.03' AS JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,( SELECT ROUND(BIYUL,2) FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN CNT_TOTAL=0 THEN 0 ELSE (CNT_ELEC/CNT_TOTAL) * 100 END AS BIYUL FROM ( SELECT /*+ FULL(X) PARALLEL(X 8) */ COUNT(*) AS CNT_ELEC
FROM ( SELECT ACNT_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG T INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD TC ON TC.TRDG_CODE = T.TRDG_CODE AND TC.DTLS_TRDG_NAME NOT LIKE '%대차%' WHERE T.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND T.TRDG_CODE >= '300000' AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT LIKE '%9' AND T.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND T.CRNY_CODE IN ('KRW', ' ', '') AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT IN('301180' ,'301189' ,'301420' ,'301430' ,'301439' ,'301440' ,'301449' ,'301450' ,'301459' ,'301460','301469' ,'301890' ,'301899' ,'301900' ,'301909' ,'301910' ,'301919' ,'301920' ,'301929' ,'302230' ,'302239','302240' ,'302249' ,'303910' ,'303919' ,'A99010' ,'Q00400' ,'Q00800' ,'T00030' ,'U00080' ,'U00200' ,'U00500') AND T.ACNT_TRDG_KIND_CODE <> '14' -- 주석거래(관리점변경, 통장기장 등) AND T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE NOT LIKE 'B%' -- 배치거래 제외
AND ( NVL(T.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE, T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) LIKE 'G%' OR NVL(T.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE, T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) LIKE 'H%' -- HTS/홈페이지 계열 OR NVL(T.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE, T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) LIKE 'I%' -- 모바일 계열 OR NVL(T.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE, T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) LIKE 'E%' -- ARS 계열 )
UNION ALL
SELECT /*+ FULL(B) PARALLEL(B 8) */ ACNT_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG T INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD TC ON TC.TRDG_CODE = T.TRDG_CODE AND TC.DTLS_TRDG_NAME NOT LIKE '%대차%' INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUM_MARKET_DATA A ON A.BSNS_DATE = T.TRDG_DATE AND A.PRIC_TYPE_CODE = 'BKR' -- 가격유형코드(BKR.한국은행고시환율) AND A.DATA_VALU_TYPE_CODE = 'XCR' -- 데이터값유형코드(XCR.환율) AND A.DATA_SORC_ENTY_ID = 102001 -- 블룸버그 AND A.EOD_TYPE_CODE = 'SNP' -- EOD유형코드(EOD.EOD, SNP.스냅샷) INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUP_CURRENCY_PAIR B ON A.PRDT_ID = B.PRDT_ID AND B.BAS_CRNY_CODE = 'KRW' AND B.TAGT_CRNY_CODE = T.CRNY_CODE -- ,ACNT_LIST AC WHERE T.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND T.TRDG_CODE >= '300000' AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT LIKE '%9' AND T.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND (T.CRNY_CODE <> 'KRW' AND T.CRNY_CODE <> ' ' AND T.CRNY_CODE IS NOT NULL) AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT IN('301180' ,'301189' ,'301420' ,'301430' ,'301439' ,'301440' ,'301449' ,'301450' ,'301459' ,'301460','301469' ,'301890' ,'301899' ,'301900' ,'301909' ,'301910' ,'301919' ,'301920' ,'301929' ,'302230' ,'302239','302240' ,'302249' ,'303910' ,'303919' ,'A99010' ,'Q00400' ,'Q00800' ,'T00030' ,'U00080' ,'U00200' ,'U00500') AND T.ACNT_TRDG_KIND_CODE <> '14' -- 주석거래(관리점변경, 통장기장 등) AND T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE NOT LIKE 'B%' -- 배치거래 제외
AND ( NVL(T.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE, T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) LIKE 'G%' OR NVL(T.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE, T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) LIKE 'H%' -- HTS/홈페이지 계열 OR NVL(T.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE, T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) LIKE 'I%' -- 모바일 계열 OR NVL(T.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE, T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) LIKE 'E%' -- ARS 계열 ) ) ZZ WHERE 1 = 1
) X
, ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT_TOTAL
FROM ( SELECT ACNT_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG T INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD TC ON TC.TRDG_CODE = T.TRDG_CODE AND TC.DTLS_TRDG_NAME NOT LIKE '%대차%' WHERE T.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND T.TRDG_CODE >= '300000' AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT LIKE '%9' AND T.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND T.CRNY_CODE IN ('KRW', ' ', '') AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT IN('301180' ,'301189' ,'301420' ,'301430' ,'301439' ,'301440' ,'301449' ,'301450' ,'301459' ,'301460','301469' ,'301890' ,'301899' ,'301900' ,'301909' ,'301910' ,'301919' ,'301920' ,'301929' ,'302230' ,'302239','302240' ,'302249' ,'303910' ,'303919' ,'A99010' ,'Q00400' ,'Q00800' ,'T00030' ,'U00080' ,'U00200' ,'U00500') AND T.ACNT_TRDG_KIND_CODE <> '14' -- 주석거래(관리점변경, 통장기장 등) AND T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE NOT LIKE 'B%' -- 배치거래 제외
UNION ALL
SELECT /*+ FULL(B) PARALLEL(B 8) */ ACNT_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG T INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD TC ON TC.TRDG_CODE = T.TRDG_CODE AND TC.DTLS_TRDG_NAME NOT LIKE '%대차%' INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUM_MARKET_DATA A ON A.BSNS_DATE = T.TRDG_DATE AND A.PRIC_TYPE_CODE = 'BKR' -- 가격유형코드(BKR.한국은행고시환율) AND A.DATA_VALU_TYPE_CODE = 'XCR' -- 데이터값유형코드(XCR.환율) AND A.DATA_SORC_ENTY_ID = 102001 -- 블룸버그 AND A.EOD_TYPE_CODE = 'SNP' -- EOD유형코드(EOD.EOD, SNP.스냅샷) INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUP_CURRENCY_PAIR B ON A.PRDT_ID = B.PRDT_ID AND B.BAS_CRNY_CODE = 'KRW' AND B.TAGT_CRNY_CODE = T.CRNY_CODE -- ,ACNT_LIST AC WHERE T.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND T.TRDG_CODE >= '300000' AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT LIKE '%9' AND T.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND (T.CRNY_CODE <> 'KRW' AND T.CRNY_CODE <> ' ' AND T.CRNY_CODE IS NOT NULL) AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT IN('301180' ,'301189' ,'301420' ,'301430' ,'301439' ,'301440' ,'301449' ,'301450' ,'301459' ,'301460','301469' ,'301890' ,'301899' ,'301900' ,'301909' ,'301910' ,'301919' ,'301920' ,'301929' ,'302230' ,'302239','302240' ,'302249' ,'303910' ,'303919' ,'A99010' ,'Q00400' ,'Q00800' ,'T00030' ,'U00080' ,'U00200' ,'U00500') AND T.ACNT_TRDG_KIND_CODE <> '14' -- 주석거래(관리점변경, 통장기장 등) AND T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE NOT LIKE 'B%' -- 배치거래 제외
) ZZ WHERE 1 = 1 ) ) ) AS IN_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,#{J1_S_DT} AS SMMT_STRT_DT -- 집계기준시작일 ,#{J1_E_DT} AS SMMT_END_DT -- 집계기준종료일 FROM DUAL

-- I.4.01.04 전자금융 경로 거래 금액 비율 INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I (BAS_YYMM,JIPYO_IDX,IN_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME,SMMT_STRT_DT,SMMT_END_DT) SELECT SUBSTR(#{J1_E_DT},1,6) AS BAS_YYMM -- 기준년월 ,'I.4.01.04' AS JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,( SELECT ROUND(X.AMT_ELEC / CASE WHEN Y.AMT_TOTAL = 0 THEN 1 ELSE Y.AMT_TOTAL END * 100, 2) AS RSLT_VALU FROM ( SELECT SUM(ZZ.TRDG_AMNT) AS AMT_ELEC FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('3', '4') THEN T.BFTX_KRW_TRDG_AMNT -- 입출금 ELSE T.TRDG_DNOM_AMNT END AS TRDG_AMNT -- 입출고 FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG T INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD TC ON TC.TRDG_CODE = T.TRDG_CODE AND TC.DTLS_TRDG_NAME NOT LIKE '%대차%' WHERE T.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND T.TRDG_CODE >= '300000' AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT LIKE '%9' AND T.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND T.CRNY_CODE IN ('KRW', ' ', '') AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT IN('301180' ,'301189' ,'301420' ,'301430' ,'301439' ,'301440' ,'301449' ,'301450' ,'301459' ,'301460','301469' ,'301890' ,'301899' ,'301900' ,'301909' ,'301910' ,'301919' ,'301920' ,'301929' ,'302230' ,'302239','302240' ,'302249' ,'303910' ,'303919' ,'A99010' ,'Q00400' ,'Q00800' ,'T00030' ,'U00080' ,'U00200' ,'U00500') AND T.ACNT_TRDG_KIND_CODE <> '14' -- 주석거래(관리점변경, 통장기장 등) AND T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE NOT LIKE 'B%' -- 배치거래 제외
AND (NVL(T.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE, T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) LIKE 'G%' OR NVL(T.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE, T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) LIKE 'H%' -- HTS/홈페이지 계열 OR NVL(T.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE, T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) LIKE 'I%' -- 모바일 계열 OR NVL(T.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE, T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) LIKE 'E%' -- ARS 계열 )
UNION ALL
SELECT /*+ FULL(B) PARALLEL(B 8) */ CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('3', '4') THEN T.BFTX_FRGN_CRNY_TRDG_AMNT * (A.DATA_VALU / B.BAS_SCLG_FCTR) -- 입출금 ELSE T.TRDG_DLNG_UNIT_PRIC * T.TRDG_PRCE_QNTY * (A.DATA_VALU / B.BAS_SCLG_FCTR) END AS TRDG_AMNT -- 입출고 FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG T INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD TC ON TC.TRDG_CODE = T.TRDG_CODE AND TC.DTLS_TRDG_NAME NOT LIKE '%대차%' INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUM_MARKET_DATA A ON A.BSNS_DATE = T.TRDG_DATE AND A.PRIC_TYPE_CODE = 'BKR' -- 가격유형코드(BKR.한국은행고시환율) AND A.DATA_VALU_TYPE_CODE = 'XCR' -- 데이터값유형코드(XCR.환율) AND A.DATA_SORC_ENTY_ID = 102001 -- 블룸버그 AND A.EOD_TYPE_CODE = 'SNP' -- EOD유형코드(EOD.EOD, SNP.스냅샷) INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUP_CURRENCY_PAIR B ON A.PRDT_ID = B.PRDT_ID AND B.BAS_CRNY_CODE = 'KRW' AND B.TAGT_CRNY_CODE = T.CRNY_CODE WHERE T.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND T.TRDG_CODE >= '300000' AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT LIKE '%9' AND T.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND (T.CRNY_CODE <> 'KRW' AND T.CRNY_CODE <> ' ' AND T.CRNY_CODE IS NOT NULL) AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT IN('301180' ,'301189' ,'301420' ,'301430' ,'301439' ,'301440' ,'301449' ,'301450' ,'301459' ,'301460','301469' ,'301890' ,'301899' ,'301900' ,'301909' ,'301910' ,'301919' ,'301920' ,'301929' ,'302230' ,'302239','302240' ,'302249' ,'303910' ,'303919' ,'A99010' ,'Q00400' ,'Q00800' ,'T00030' ,'U00080' ,'U00200' ,'U00500') AND T.ACNT_TRDG_KIND_CODE <> '14' -- 주석거래(관리점변경, 통장기장 등) AND T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE NOT LIKE 'B%' -- 배치거래 제외
AND (NVL(T.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE, T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) LIKE 'G%' OR NVL(T.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE, T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) LIKE 'H%' -- HTS/홈페이지 계열 OR NVL(T.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE, T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) LIKE 'I%' -- 모바일 계열 OR NVL(T.ORGL_PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE, T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) LIKE 'E%' -- ARS 계열 )
) ZZ WHERE 1 = 1
) X , ( SELECT SUM(ZZ.TRDG_AMNT) AS AMT_TOTAL
