FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('3', '4') THEN T.BFTX_KRW_TRDG_AMNT -- 입출금 ELSE T.TRDG_DNOM_AMNT END AS TRDG_AMNT -- 입출고 FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG T INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD TC ON TC.TRDG_CODE = T.TRDG_CODE AND TC.DTLS_TRDG_NAME NOT LIKE '%대차%' WHERE T.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND T.TRDG_CODE >= '300000' AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT LIKE '%9' AND T.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND T.CRNY_CODE IN ('KRW', ' ', '') AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT IN('301180' ,'301189' ,'301420' ,'301430' ,'301439' ,'301440' ,'301449' ,'301450' ,'301459' ,'301460','301469' ,'301890' ,'301899' ,'301900' ,'301909' ,'301910' ,'301919' ,'301920' ,'301929' ,'302230' ,'302239','302240' ,'302249' ,'303910' ,'303919' ,'A99010' ,'Q00400' ,'Q00800' ,'T00030' ,'U00080' ,'U00200' ,'U00500') AND T.ACNT_TRDG_KIND_CODE <> '14' -- 주석거래(관리점변경, 통장기장 등) AND T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE NOT LIKE 'B%' -- 배치거래 제외
UNION ALL
SELECT /*+ FULL(B) PARALLEL(B 8) */ CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('3', '4') THEN T.BFTX_FRGN_CRNY_TRDG_AMNT * (A.DATA_VALU / B.BAS_SCLG_FCTR) -- 입출금 ELSE T.TRDG_DLNG_UNIT_PRIC * T.TRDG_PRCE_QNTY * (A.DATA_VALU / B.BAS_SCLG_FCTR) END AS TRDG_AMNT -- 입출고 FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG T INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD TC ON TC.TRDG_CODE = T.TRDG_CODE AND TC.DTLS_TRDG_NAME NOT LIKE '%대차%' INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUM_MARKET_DATA A ON A.BSNS_DATE = T.TRDG_DATE AND A.PRIC_TYPE_CODE = 'BKR' -- 가격유형코드(BKR.한국은행고시환율) AND A.DATA_VALU_TYPE_CODE = 'XCR' -- 데이터값유형코드(XCR.환율) AND A.DATA_SORC_ENTY_ID = 102001 -- 블룸버그 AND A.EOD_TYPE_CODE = 'SNP' -- EOD유형코드(EOD.EOD, SNP.스냅샷) INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUP_CURRENCY_PAIR B ON A.PRDT_ID = B.PRDT_ID AND B.BAS_CRNY_CODE = 'KRW' AND B.TAGT_CRNY_CODE = T.CRNY_CODE WHERE T.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND T.TRDG_CODE >= '300000' AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT LIKE '%9' AND T.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND (T.CRNY_CODE <> 'KRW' AND T.CRNY_CODE <> ' ' AND T.CRNY_CODE IS NOT NULL) AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT IN('301180' ,'301189' ,'301420' ,'301430' ,'301439' ,'301440' ,'301449' ,'301450' ,'301459' ,'301460','301469' ,'301890' ,'301899' ,'301900' ,'301909' ,'301910' ,'301919' ,'301920' ,'301929' ,'302230' ,'302239','302240' ,'302249' ,'303910' ,'303919' ,'A99010' ,'Q00400' ,'Q00800' ,'T00030' ,'U00080' ,'U00200' ,'U00500') AND T.ACNT_TRDG_KIND_CODE <> '14' -- 주석거래(관리점변경, 통장기장 등) AND T.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE NOT LIKE 'B%' -- 배치거래 제외
) ZZ WHERE 1 = 1 ) Y ) AS IN_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,#{J1_S_DT} AS SMMT_STRT_DT -- 집계기준시작일 ,#{J1_E_DT} AS SMMT_END_DT -- 집계기준종료일 FROM DUAL

-- I.4.01.05 : 전자금융경로 대출 규모 INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I (BAS_YYMM,JIPYO_IDX,IN_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME,SMMT_STRT_DT,SMMT_END_DT) SELECT SUBSTR(#{J1_E_DT},1,6) AS BAS_YYMM -- 기준년월 ,'I.4.01.05' AS JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,( SELECT CNT FROM ( SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MBF_LN_BSC A , SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG B WHERE A.LN_TYPE_DTLS_CODE IN ('21') -- 21.예탁증권담보대출, 33.매도증권담보대출(NEW) AND B.LN_TYPE_DTLS_CODE IN ('21') AND A.LN_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND B.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND A.LN_CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND B.CANC_YN <> 'Y' AND A.LN_DATE = B.TRDG_DATE AND A.ACNT_ID = B.ACNT_ID AND A.LN_SQNO = B.TRDG_NO AND SUBSTR(B.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('I', 'G', 'H') ) WHERE 1 = 1 ) AS IN_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,#{J1_S_DT} AS SMMT_STRT_DT -- 집계기준시작일 ,#{J1_E_DT} AS SMMT_END_DT -- 집계기준종료일 FROM DUAL

--O.13.01.021 법인고객 실제소유자 재확인실적 --[입력항목] 1) 일회성 금융거래 고객확인 총 건수, 2) 상급자에 의한 재확인 고객확인 총 건수
INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I (BAS_YYMM,JIPYO_IDX,IN_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME,SMMT_STRT_DT,SMMT_END_DT) SELECT SUBSTR(#{J1_E_DT},1,6) AS BAS_YYMM -- 기준년월 ,'O.13.01.021' AS JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,( SELECT ROUND(T.CNT) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID) AS CNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_CHAN A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y'
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') /* 리테일계좌만 */ AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') /* 정상/통합계좌 보유고객 */ OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B WHERE B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND B.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ )
AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID IN ( SELECT U.ACNT_OWNR_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG T , SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT U WHERE T.ACNT_ID = U.ACNT_ID AND T.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT IN ('301180' ,'301189' ,'301420' ,'301430' ,'301439' ,'301440' ,'301449' ,'301450' ,'301459' ,'301460' ,'301469' ,'301890' ,'301899' ,'301900' ,'301909' ,'301910' ,'301919' ,'301920' ,'301929' ,'302230' ,'302239' ,'302240' ,'302249' ,'303910' ,'303919' ,'A99010' ,'Q00400' ,'Q00800' ,'T00030' ,'U00080' ,'U00200' ,'U00500') )
AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE < #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* CDD수행일자 */ AND A.CDD_RE_FLFL_XPCN_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} /* CDD재수행예정일자 */ AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') /* 등급 존재 */ AND (A.NTNY_ID IN ( -- 사업장국가ID : CDD정보 SELECT CNTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY C1 , SSQ.NIC92B C2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND C2.CD = 'H_COUNTRY' AND C2.USE_F = 'Y' AND TRIM(C1.CNTY_CODE) = TRIM(C2.CNTNT) )
OR A.BSPL_CNTY_ID IN ( -- 사업장국가ID : CDD정보 SELECT CNTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY C1 , SSQ.NIC92B C2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND C2.CD = 'H_COUNTRY' AND C2.USE_F = 'Y' AND TRIM(C1.CNTY_CODE) = TRIM(C2.CNTNT) )
OR A.MNBR_CNTY_ID IN ( -- 본점국가ID : CDD정보 SELECT CNTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY C1 , SSQ.NIC92B C2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND C2.CD = 'H_COUNTRY' AND C2.USE_F = 'Y' AND TRIM(C1.CNTY_CODE) = TRIM(C2.CNTNT) ) ) )T WHERE 1 = 1 ) AS IN_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,#{J1_S_DT} AS SMMT_STRT_DT -- 집계기준시작일 ,#{J1_E_DT} AS SMMT_END_DT -- 집계기준종료일 FROM DUAL

--O.13.01.022 법인고객 실제소유자 재확인실적 --[입력항목] 1) 일회성 금융거래 고객확인 총 건수, 2) 상급자에 의한 재확인 고객확인 총 건수
INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I (BAS_YYMM,JIPYO_IDX,IN_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME,SMMT_STRT_DT,SMMT_END_DT) SELECT SUBSTR(#{J1_E_DT},1,6) AS BAS_YYMM -- 기준년월 ,'O.13.01.022' AS JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,( SELECT CNT FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT M.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID) AS CNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_CHAN M WHERE 1 = 1 /* 20170421 ~ 20180420 기간 내 최초수행등급이 M이고 */ AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_CHAN P , ( SELECT L.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , L.CDD_FLFL_DATE , L.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , L.RK FROM ( SELECT K.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , K.CDD_FLFL_DATE , K.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY K.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID ORDER BY K.CDD_FLFL_DATE ASC) AS RK FROM ( SELECT J.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , J.CDD_FLFL_DATE CDD_FLFL_DATE , MAX(J.CDD_FLFL_SQNO) CDD_FLFL_SQNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_CHAN J WHERE 1 = 1 AND J.CDD_FLFL_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} GROUP BY J.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID, J.CDD_FLFL_DATE ) K WHERE 1 = 1 ) L WHERE 1 = 1 AND L.RK = 1 ) Q WHERE P.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = Q.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND P.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = Q.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND P.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'M'
AND P.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = M.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND P.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = M.CDD_FLFL_SQNO ) /* 20170421 ~ 20200420에 CDD를 2회 이상 한 고객(날짜가 다른 경우만) */ AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT Q.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AS CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT P.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , P.CDD_FLFL_DATE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_CHAN P WHERE 1 = 1 AND P.CDD_FLFL_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} GROUP BY P.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID, P.CDD_FLFL_DATE ) Q WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY Q.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) R WHERE R.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = M.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID ) ) WHERE 1 = 1 ) AS IN_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,#{J1_S_DT} AS SMMT_STRT_DT -- 집계기준시작일 ,#{J1_E_DT} AS SMMT_END_DT -- 집계기준종료일 FROM DUAL

INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I (BAS_YYMM,JIPYO_IDX,IN_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME,SMMT_STRT_DT,SMMT_END_DT) SELECT SUBSTR(#{J1_E_DT},1,6) AS BAS_YYMM -- 기준년월 ,'O.13.01.041' AS JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,( SELECT CNT FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID) AS CNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_CHAN A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y'
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') /* 리테일계좌만 */ AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') /* 정상/통합계좌 보유고객 */ OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B WHERE B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND B.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ )
AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID IN ( SELECT U.ACNT_OWNR_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG T , SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT U WHERE T.ACNT_ID = U.ACNT_ID AND T.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT IN ('301180' ,'301189' ,'301420' ,'301430' ,'301439' ,'301440' ,'301449' ,'301450' ,'301459' ,'301460' ,'301469' ,'301890' ,'301899' ,'301900' ,'301909' ,'301910' ,'301919' ,'301920' ,'301929' ,'302230' ,'302239' ,'302240' ,'302249' ,'303910' ,'303919' ,'A99010' ,'Q00400' ,'Q00800' ,'T00030' ,'U00080' ,'U00200' ,'U00500') )
AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE < #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* CDD수행일자 */ AND A.CDD_RE_FLFL_XPCN_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} /* CDD재수행예정일자 */ AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') /* 등급 존재 */ ) WHERE 1 = 1 ) AS IN_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,#{J1_S_DT} AS SMMT_STRT_DT -- 집계기준시작일 ,#{J1_E_DT} AS SMMT_END_DT -- 집계기준종료일 FROM DUAL

INSERT INTO JRBA_JIPYO_MM_I (BAS_YYMM,JIPYO_IDX,IN_V,DR_DT,DR_TIME,SMMT_STRT_DT,SMMT_END_DT) SELECT SUBSTR(#{J1_E_DT},1,6) AS BAS_YYMM -- 기준년월 ,'O.13.01.091' AS JIPYO_IDX -- 보고지표인덱스 ,( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) */ COUNT(DISTINCT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID) AS CNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_CHAN A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y'
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') /* 리테일계좌만 */ AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') /* 정상/통합계좌 보유고객 */ OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{btBasDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B WHERE B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND B.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ )
AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID IN ( SELECT U.ACNT_OWNR_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG T , SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT U WHERE T.ACNT_ID = U.ACNT_ID AND T.TRDG_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} AND T.TRDG_CODE NOT IN ('301180' ,'301189' ,'301420' ,'301430' ,'301439' ,'301440' ,'301449' ,'301450' ,'301459' ,'301460' ,'301469' ,'301890' ,'301899' ,'301900' ,'301909' ,'301910' ,'301919' ,'301920' ,'301929' ,'302230' ,'302239' ,'302240' ,'302249' ,'303910' ,'303919' ,'A99010' ,'Q00400' ,'Q00800' ,'T00030' ,'U00080' ,'U00200' ,'U00500') )
AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} /* CDD수행일자 */ AND A.CDD_RE_FLFL_XPCN_DATE BETWEEN #{J1_S_DT} AND #{J1_E_DT} /* CDD재수행예정일자 */ AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') /* 등급 존재 */ AND (A.NTNY_ID IN ( -- 사업장국가ID : CDD정보 SELECT CNTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY C1 , SSQ.NIC92B C2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND C2.CD = 'H_COUNTRY' AND C2.USE_F = 'Y' AND TRIM(C1.CNTY_CODE) = TRIM(C2.CNTNT) ) OR A.BSPL_CNTY_ID IN ( -- 사업장국가ID : CDD정보 SELECT CNTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY C1 , ( SELECT DISTINCT NTN_CD FROM SRBA_NAT_I WHERE BAS_YYMM IN ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_NAT_I ) ) C2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND TRIM(C1.CNTY_CODE) = TRIM(C2.NTN_CD) ) OR A.MNBR_CNTY_ID IN ( -- 본점국가ID : CDD정보 SELECT CNTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY C1 , ( SELECT DISTINCT NTN_CD FROM SRBA_NAT_I WHERE BAS_YYMM IN ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_NAT_I ) ) C2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND TRIM(C1.CNTY_CODE) = TRIM(C2.NTN_CD) ) ) ) AS IN_V ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT -- 등록일자 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME -- 등록시간 ,#{J1_S_DT} AS SMMT_STRT_DT -- 집계기준시작일 ,#{J1_E_DT} AS SMMT_END_DT -- 집계기준종료일 FROM DUAL
